Phoebe inadvertently spoils Mike's anniversary surprise, and Joey writes a letter of recommendation for the Bings. Comedy, guest starring Christina Applegate and Paul Rudd

programme.title: OMG
programme.desc: People using surgery to recapture their lost youth, including a man who feels his suits do not look right on him any more and a woman who wants to have Britain's largest fake breasts. A great grandmother prepares to have her third facelift and a man who has recently returned to the dating scene gets tips from a friend on concealing his wrinkles

programme.title: Britain's Great Cathedrals with Tony Robinson
programme.desc: In one of the biggest engineering projects of the Middle Ages, Salisbury Cathedral was moved from a wind-blasted Iron Age hill fort to its current location - a feat accomplished in just 38 years, helping establish the Wiltshire city in the process. A place of both ancient tradition and home to one of the country's oldest choirs, Tony witnesses the ritual of inducting a new chorister and sees the oldest working clock in the world. The presenter also reflects on the cathedral's role in a clandestine operation that helped turn the tide of the Second World War

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Ann Maurice and Alistair Appleton head for Sandhurst, Berkshire, to offer advice to Julie Frith, the owner of a four-bedroom house that has remained unsold for a year, despite two reductions in the asking price. The first thing that strikes potential buyers is the property's unfinished feel

programme.title: Mary and the Witch's Flower (2017)
programme.desc: A strange flower grants a girl magic powers. Animated adventure based on The Little Broomstick by Mary Stewart, featuring the voices of Kate Winslet and Jim Broadbent. Dubbed in English

programme.title: Shrek the Third (2007)
programme.desc: The bad-tempered ogre finds himself in the unwelcome position of being next in line for the throne. Preferring to stay at home in the swamps, he sets out on a quest to find the rightful heir - a rebellious teenager named Artie - and persuade him to face up to his responsibilities as the future king. Meanwhile, the ambitious Prince Charming sees his chance to take the throne. Animated comedy, with the voices of Mike Myers, Cameron Diaz, Justin Timberlake, Eddie Murphy, Antonio Banderas and Rupert Everett

programme.title: Megamind (2010)
programme.desc: An evil genius finally succeeds in killing the superhero who has foiled his every evil scheme, but finds life without an enemy boring. To fill the gap, he transforms an ordinary man into a worthy adversary - but when his creation turns evil, it falls to the villain to save the world. Animated comedy, with the voices of Will Ferrell, Tina Fey and Brad Pitt

programme.title: Monster Trucks (2016)
programme.desc: A drilling operation unleashes a subterranean creature which feeds on oil. The monster bonds with a monster truck which a local teenager is building from spare parts, and the youngster befriends the beast and helps it to return to its underground home. Fantasy adventure, starring Lucas Till and Jane Levy

programme.title: Keeping Up with the Joneses (2016)
programme.desc: A suburban couple become embroiled in an international espionage plot when they discover that their seemingly perfect new neighbours are actually government spies. Action comedy, starring Zach Galifianakis, Isla Fisher, Jon Hamm and Gal Gadot

programme.title: Bumblebee (2018)
programme.desc: In 1987, Californian teenager Charlie Watson is traumatised by the death of her father, while her mother Sally and new boyfriend Ron leaves her feeling even more alone. For her 18th-birthday she's given a yellow Volkswagen Beetle, which turns out to be the battle-scarred Autobot Bumblebee. Transformers prequel, starring Hailee Steinfeld, John Cena and Jorge Lendeborg Jr

programme.title: Mary Magdalene (2018)
programme.desc: In 33AD, when Judea is under the control of the Roman Empire, a woman named Mary from the town of Magdala begins to follow Jesus of Nazareth, causing conflict with the male disciples, including Saint Peter. Drama, starring Rooney Mara, Joaquin Phoenix and Chiwetel Ejiofor

programme.title: Before I Go to Sleep (2014)
programme.desc: A woman who cannot retain her memories following a traumatic accident is contacted by a mysterious neuropsychologist, who offers to help her recover the truth about her condition. As she tries to piece together the events of her past, she begins to fear neither her husband nor the doctor are who they seem to be. Thriller, starring Nicole Kidman, Colin Firth and Mark Strong

programme.title: Stuart Little (1999)
programme.desc: An American couple decide their son needs a brother, and plan to adopt another child - but when they get to the orphanage they are greeted by a charming talking mouse named Stuart, who fits the bill perfectly. However, their jealous cat hatches a plot to get rid of the new arrival. Comedy adventure, starring Geena Davis and Hugh Laurie, with the voice of Michael J Fox

programme.title: Flushed Away (2006)
programme.desc: A pampered pet rodent is flushed down a toilet and ends up in a vast underground rat city in the sewers of London. He is befriended by a quick-witted rat who offers to help him find his way home, but first the hapless pair have to escape the clutches of an evil toad bent on ridding the rodent metropolis of its residents. Animated comedy, with the voices of Hugh Jackman, Kate Winslet, Ian McKellen, Shane Richie, Jean Reno and Bill Nighy

programme.title: Young Sherlock Holmes (1985)
programme.desc: The teenage detective and his future sidekick Watson meet for the first time at boarding school. The death of Holmes's mentor sets the youngsters on their first case, and they discover that former members of an archaeological survey team have died under suspicious circumstances - pointing to a sinister Egyptian cult using hallucinogenic poisons to kill its victims. Adventure, starring Nicholas Rowe, Alan Cox and Sophie Ward

programme.title: Zathura: A Space Adventure (2005)
programme.desc: Two squabbling brothers with time on their hands decide to play a mysterious old board game after finding it in their basement. A chance roll of the dice sends their house into deep space, where they must battle with aliens and work together to stay alive. Family sci-fi adventure, starring Josh Hutcherson, Jonah Bobo, Kristen Stewart, Tim Robbins and Dax Shepard

programme.title: Stargate (1994)
programme.desc: An Egyptologist and a soldier head an expedition through a mysterious portal to an alien planet. The world they find resembles ancient Egypt and is under the rule of a tyrant who has convinced the downtrodden inhabitants that he is a god - until the humans incite the enslaved populace to fight back. Sci-fi adventure, starring Kurt Russell, James Spader and Jaye Davidson

programme.title: Four Weddings and a Funeral (1994)
programme.desc: A London man's misfortunes in love look set to change when he meets an American beauty. However, the prospect of a transatlantic relationship succeeding seems slim, so the pair go their separate ways - only for him to realise he is unable to get her out of his mind. Richard Curtis's comedy, with Hugh Grant, Andie MacDowell, John Hannah, Charlotte Coleman, Kristin Scott Thomas, Simon Callow and James Fleet

programme.title: Tangerine (2015)
programme.desc: Transgender prostitute Sin-Dee Rella returns to her West Hollywood neighbourhood on Christmas Eve following a stint in jail, only to discover that her pimp boyfriend Chester has slept with another woman while she was incarcerated. Despite her trans best friend Alexandra's efforts to calm her down, Sin-Dee is determined to hunt the woman down. Comedy drama shot entirely with iPhones, starring Kitana Kiki Rodriguez, Mya Taylor, Karren Karagulian and James Ransone

programme.title: The American Friend (1977)
programme.desc: A would-be murderer persuades a neighbour to aid his diabolical plot by convincing his unsuspecting friend he is suffering from a fatal disease and therefore has nothing to lose. Wim Wenders' drama based on Patricia Highsmith's novel Ripley's Game, starring Dennis Hopper and Bruno Ganz

programme.title: Stuart Little 2 (2002)
programme.desc: The plucky talking mouse feels left out when the son of his adopted human family makes a new pal - but quickly forgets such trifling matters when his high-flying canary friend is captured by an evil falcon, prompting the brave rodent to mount a daring rescue. Family adventure sequel, with Geena Davis, Hugh Laurie and Jonathan Lipnicki, and the voices of Michael J Fox, Melanie Griffith and James Woods

programme.title: The SpongeBob SquarePants Movie (2004)
programme.desc: The plucky sea creature sets out to prove his boss Mr Krabs is innocent of stealing Neptune's crown. However, the missing item has ended up in sinister Shell City, which all sea-dwellers fear and from which few have ever returned. Animated comedy, with the voices of Tom Kenny, Bill Fagerbakke, Clancy Brown and Scarlett Johansson, plus a cameo appearance by David Hasselhoff

programme.title: Baby Boom (1987)
programme.desc: A successful New York consultant is made the guardian of her dead cousin's baby daughter. At first she plans to put the child up for adoption, but finds herself unable to go through with it and reluctantly takes on the role of mother - a decision that throws her personal and professional lives into turmoil. Comedy, starring Diane Keaton, Harold Ramis, Sam Shepard and Sam Wanamaker

programme.title: Deep Impact (1998)
programme.desc: A TV reporter investigating a presidential misdemeanour stumbles on evidence that a comet is on a collision course with Earth, threatening the future of the human race. Meanwhile, an astronaut prepares to lead his crew on a do-or-die mission to intercept the danger. Sci-fi drama, starring Robert Duvall, Tea Leoni, Morgan Freeman and Elijah Wood

programme.title: The League of Extraordinary Gentlemen (2003)
programme.desc: Fearless hunter Allan Quatermain teams up with a host of other characters from Victorian literature - including Captain Nemo, the Invisible Man, Tom Sawyer and Dr Jekyll - to put a stop to the nefarious Fantom's evil plot to bring about a world war. Fantasy adventure, based on Alan Moore's comic-book series, starring Sean Connery in his final screen role, Shane West, Stuart Townsend, Richard Roxburgh, Peta Wilson and Tony Curran

programme.title: The Nice Guys (2016)
programme.desc: A private detective investigates the murder of a porn star in 1970s Los Angeles, only to run into a hired thug employed to scare him off. However, the mysterious disappearance of a woman connected to the case forces the unlikely duo to work together, leading them to uncover a government conspiracy. Crime comedy, starring Russell Crowe and Ryan Gosling

programme.title: Four Lions (2010)
programme.desc: Disillusioned British Muslim Omar decides to form a terrorist cell, but the only recruits he can find are his dim-witted friend, an angry and bitter white convert and a timid bomb-maker. The group's incompetent attempts to strike a blow against Western society culminate in a scheme to attack the London marathon. Chris Morris' satirical comedy, with Riz Ahmed and Kayvan Novak

programme.title: Zoolander 2 (2016)
programme.desc: Dim-witted supermodels Derek Zoolander and Hansel McDonald must step back into the spotlight and save the day when a maniacal villain starts murdering some of the world's most beautiful pop stars. Comedy sequel, starring Ben Stiller and Owen Wilson, with Penelope Cruz, Will Ferrell and Kristen Wiig

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three previous restaurants he tried to save - Handlebar, Casa Roma and the Black Pearl - to find out whether his advice has been put to good use

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Diane experiences a big life event on her journey to becoming a woman, but Rainbow, Ruby, Zoey and Alicia are there to support her. Afraid that he may never be able to beat Andre Jr at basketball again, Dre conducts psychological warfare on his son before challenging him to a game

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Rainbow has been keeping in touch with Dre's godbrother Omar while he is in prison, but when the family finds out that Omar is being released, his future sparks some debate. Ruby lets it slip to Andre Jr that she has been to jail, so he pushes her to reveal more secrets from her past

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben gets it into his head that Riley fancies him when the pair are left alone after Tucker and Danny fail to turn up for movie night. Comedy series, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau, Chelsea Kane and Derek Theler

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben discovers his neighbour Kayla is hosting a playgroup for the neighbourhood kids, but is excluding his daughter because Kayla believes Ben to be a horrible father. Meanwhile, Danny asks Riley for help when his relationship with Amy hits a rocky patch. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny starts her own hair accessories business and the orders start to pile in. However, she makes the mistake of asking Sheldon to help, leading to frustration and regret. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny feels threatened when a sexy actress, who has landed a role in TV series CSI, moves into the apartment building, and gradually begins to sense that her friends are being manipulated by the new arrival. Comedy, starring Kaley Cuoco, Valerie Azlynn, Johnny Galecki and Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica and Lainey try to set Lainey's father Bill up with a 'woman of interest' by using new video dating technology. They recruit Adam to make a showreel about Bill, but Beverly insists she will find him someone to date in the old-fashioned way. Barry decides he wants to be a gym teacher and starts to act as Coach Mellor's apprentice. David Koechner and Allie Grant guest star

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam risks bodily harm during an intense game of paintball to impress his latest crush. Erica pretends she has a college-aged boyfriend, but is embarrassed when her friends see right through her deception. Murray's stubborn behaviour causes Beverly to miss seeing the Beach Boys at Live Aid

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta tries to set a new record on a training course, Diaz does not receive an invitation to Boyle's wedding, and Holt becomes addicted to a game application on his smartphone. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle asks Peralta to be his best man, but as well as helping out with cake-tasting and choosing invitations, he must also persuade the groom to start standing up to Vivian before the big day. Holt helps Diaz make a sincere apology and Jeffords, Santiago and Gina embark on a tough new diet - but struggle to stick to it

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is uninterested in Amy's career, so Penny, Raj and Leonard try to make him understand that sometimes it benefits a relationship to pretend to care about a partner's achievements. Howard notices Bernadette is uncomfortable around children when she helps him perform a magic show at his nephew's birthday party

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard asks Penny out on a date, and they agree to give their relationship another chance. They soon remember why it did not work out in the first place, but end up sleeping together anyway. The 100th episode of the comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon, Howard and Raj discover actress Summer Glau is on their train while travelling to San Francisco. Desperate to discuss the Terminator TV series with her, the friends devise a number of plans to engage her in conversation. With Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Simon Helberg and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When bad weather closes the school, Murray makes Adam and Barry shovel snow off the path, but the boys take advantage of their dad when they discover that he has a fear of snow. Beverly finds Erica's college application, in which she praises her mother as her hero, but Erica is far from pleased about it. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam tries to join the school tennis team in order to stay close to his best friend Chad. However, when Chad picks Dave Kim as his doubles partner, Adam vows to team up with Barry to beat them in a match. Beverly helps Erica to get through her post-break-up depression in time for Valentine's Day. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The precinct goes into lockdown on Thanksgiving when a mysterious powder-filled package is delivered to the building. Peralta, who has been left in charge while Holt and Jeffords are out of the office, is confident he can keep morale high and avoid any chaos - but things soon spiral out of control

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: While attempting to catch a drug dealer, Peralta and Boyle reluctantly join forces with Agent Jack Danger, a pompous investigator at the US Postal Inspection Service. Meanwhile, the other officers try to help Santiago conquer her cravings and give up smoking

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: After a week of brides' homestays, the couples reunite for a dinner party - the first time that Dean and Telv have met since their fiery encounter at a party the previous week. Gab attempts reconciliation with Nasser after their disastrous homestay - but will the night end in tears?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon and Raj organise a stag party for Howard, but stories about his sexual history are unwittingly revealed, and he has to persuade bride-to-be Bernadette not to call off the wedding. Comedy, starring Simon Helberg and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard tries to use his wedding as an excuse to avoid being sent into space, but ends up accepting the mission. Amy plots to get Sheldon to take the next step in their relationship, while Leonard accidentally asks Penny to marry him

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean
programme.desc: The Sirocco crew struggles to resolve their complicated relationships, Bobby finally finds romance in Croatia, and Hannah and Bugsy air their grievances

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: There is a clash of personalities when Sheldon and Leonard's mothers finally meet, while Howard finally decides to do his fair share of the housework - but not without a little help from his friends. Guest starring Christine Baranski and Laurie Metcalf

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon passes his driving test, so the lads decide to take a trip to a theme park. However, things start to go wrong when their route is obstructed by a funeral cortege and the newly qualified motorist has an accident in the car park. Later, Will regrets ever making the journey when he disgraces himself on a rollercoaster

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will discovers that attending a mixed-sex school is not so bad after all when he manages to get a date with the most popular girl in the year above. However, his growing obsession with her begins to alienate him from his friends. Comedy, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts the show in which potential dates bare all bit by bit in a bid to prove they are the one. First up is 27-year-old flight attendant Alex from Bristol. Having never had a serious relationship, he is hoping to land himself a man for the long haul. He is followed by 26-year-old Laura from Gloucestershire, a horse-loving country girl who is looking for love

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard is torn between his relationship with Bernadette and pleasing his mother - and comes up with a solution that leaves everyone unsatisfied. Leonard rekindles his romance with Raj's sister Priya, while Amy uses Penny's emotions as the basis for a research project

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon decides to make a new set of friends as he is depressed that the group's social world revolves around Leonard rather than himself. Meanwhile, Amy and Bernadette try to persuade Penny to go on a date. Comedy, guest starring LeVar Burton, with Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Mayim Bialik

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, including Strictly Come Dancing, Lost and Found and I'm a Celebrity, Blue Planet II, Avatar, The Sex Robots Are Coming and the news. From December 2017

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: In the series finale, Noel Fielding finds an unlikely soul mate, Lolly Adefope shows everyone the money, and Mel Giedroyc bites off more than she can chew

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: After being stood up the previous week, Geordie model Georgia ended up flirting with nice guy Alex. Now they are back to pick up where they left off. Baker Chloe prides herself on being a good judge of character, which is just as well because her date, amateur dramatics enthusiast Ben, has played many different roles in his time. Swinging sixties fan Robert is hoping fifties fashionista Amy will accompany him to a Northern Soul night after their meal - although he might have second thoughts when he sees what's tattooed on her toe. Plus, the subject of family life proves to be high on the agenda for make-up artist Verona and fire-fighter Paul, as well as father-of-one Patrick and German-born Thomas

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon passes his driving test, so the lads decide to take a trip to a theme park. However, things start to go wrong when their route is obstructed by a funeral cortege and the newly qualified motorist has an accident in the car park. Later, Will regrets ever making the journey when he disgraces himself on a rollercoaster

programme.title: The Inbetweeners

However, his growing obsession with her begins to alienate him from his friends. Comedy, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny, Stevie and Roland head to New York for their pitch meeting, while the family anxiously awaits their return

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon wins a grant to pay for a summer expedition to the North Pole, and invites his friends to join him. However, the gang's imminent departure causes Leonard and Penny to reconsider their feelings for each other. Johnny Gale and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay goes back to two restaurants - Giuseppi's and Sante La Brea - to check in with the owners he helped in the past and find out whether his advice has been put to good use. Will he be pleased with their progress? Plus, an update on Finn McCool's from season one

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Dre is chosen to lead Stevens & Lido's new charity campaign helping people give back to their community, but when Rainbow points out there's more to giving back than writing cheques, he donates some of his clothes to a man in need. Andre Jr fails his driving test, so Ruby offers to act as chaperone when he takes the twins out on a trip

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Dre is diagnosed with type 2 diabetes, but after talking to Pops he becomes determined to cure himself. Meanwhile, Jack is convinced that baby DeVante hates him, so he enlists Andre Jr and Diane's help to win over his little brother

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben learns that is it all his fault that Riley does not like celebrating her birthday. He plans a surprise to make it up to her but, in typical fashion, disaster ensues. Meanwhile, Bonnie reveals that she forgot to complete some paperwork and that Ben isn't Emma's sole custodian. Starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben and Danny wear elf suits on their quest to find a particular Christmas gift for Emma, while Riley and Tucker help Bonnie plan a seasonal celebration. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau and Tahj Mowry

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny catches the eye of comic-book shopkeeper Stuart, and Leonard is devastated when she gives serious consideration to dating her new admirer. Desperate for help, Leonard enlists Sheldon to discredit his love rival by preying on his obsession with Batman. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Kevin Sussman star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Stuart takes Penny out for a second date, during which she drunkenly reveals her true feelings. Meanwhile, Howard uncovers a flaw in the toilet he designed for a Nasa space shuttle, and asks his friends to help him correct it before the launch. Kaley Cuoco, Kevin Sussman and Simon Helberg star

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After getting telephone answering machines, Murray and Pop-Pop wage a message war on one another, so Erica, Barry and Pops try to reunite them at a hockey game

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam tries to be a horror writer, but his efforts get him grounded on Halloween when Beverly discovers that she is the basis for the monster in his story. Erica forces Barry to attend a costume dance with her

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta enlists Jeffords to help him tackle a cold case that everyone thinks is unsolvable. Meanwhile, Santiago plans a romantic weekend away with her new boyfriend Teddy, and Gina and Diaz tell Boyle one of their best-kept secrets. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Melissa Fumero

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta suspects a civic leader of money laundering, but his investigation is shut down by the police commissioner. Determined to crack the case, he enlists Santiago and Holt to help uncover more evidence - and risks suspension as a result. Boyle is devastated when Vivian ends their relationship, so his colleagues try to cheer him up

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny continue testing their rekindled relationship using an innovative system to report discrepancies. Howard and Bernadette begin to worry when Raj starts treating his new phone like a person, while Sheldon and Amy try to achieve internet fame by creating a video podcast about flags

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After a sleepless night, Leonard breaks his room-mate agreement with Sheldon. Howard makes preparations to go on a flight to the International Space Station and enlists Raj's help to ensure he gets a cool astronaut nickname

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny starts her own hair accessories business and the orders start to pile in. However, she makes the mistake of asking Sheldon to help, leading to frustration and regret. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica is jealous of Barry's outstanding performance when they both get after-school jobs at Spencer's Gifts selling novelty presents at the shopping mall. Murray insists that Adam must get a job too, but Beverly thinks he should focus on his filmmaking instead

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam tries to develop an acting career, a talent agent decides he's only suitable for 'nerd' roles, so Beverly makes it her mission to turn him into a teen heartthrob. Barry decides to embrace the punk rock lifestyle, and Murray attempts to get more involved in Erica's life

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta tries to add a touch of romance to an event when he invites his girlfriend Sophia (Eva Longoria) to the precinct's work trip, along with Amy's boyfriend, Teddy (Kyle Bornheimer). Meanwhile, Charles is keen to help Holt with his anniversary breakfast, and Rosa refuses to admit to Terry and Gina that she is unwell. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Doug Judy (Craig Robinson) is returned to custody after scamming Jake and Rosa in a previous encounter, but Captain Holt offers him a plea deal when he reveals he knows the location of a notorious drug dealer. Meanwhile, Gina and Boyle become concerned about their parents' relationship, and Santiago makes Holt a Christmas gift. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The experts have high hopes for the couples' marriages at the penultimate commitment ceremony - but the fallout from Nasser's behaviour looks set to ruin his relationship with Gab

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As Howard and his fellow astronauts sit in the space shuttle awaiting launch, he reflects on the tumultuous events of the previous few days, when he and Bernadette tried to get married. Meanwhile, his friends witness the blast-off on TV at home

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Despite being on the International Space Station, Howard gets caught in a strange argument between Bernadette and his mother via video link. Elsewhere, Raj feels lonely while his best friend is away and ends up interfering with Sheldon's and Leonard's dates. Comedy, starring Simon Helberg

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean
programme.desc: Chef Adam returns and is ready to redeem himself after nearly getting fired, and Kasey comes aboard teeming with confidence

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon presses Leonard and Penny to choose a date for their wedding, while he also has to deal with dramatic changes in his own relationship with Amy. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Jack Reacher: Never Go Back (2016)
programme.desc: The nomadic vigilante tries to save an army major who has been framed for murder and treason. Jack Reacher discovers that Turner has been targeted by a secret government conspiracy, and together they go on the run to expose the truth. Director Edward Zwick's blockbusting action thriller sequel based on Lee Child's novel, starring Tom Cruise, Cobie Smulders, Danika Yarosh and Aldis Hodge

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard faces the difficult decision of choosing between his relationship with Priya and his friendship with Penny, while Sheldon is irritated by one of Howard's magic tricks. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is distraught when his online gaming account is hacked, so his friends decide to find out who is responsible. However, they make the disastrous mistake of confronting the culprit in person. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, featuring Natural World: Attenborough's Wonder of Eggs, The Generation Game, The Silence of the Lambs, Come Home, First Dates and The Yorkshire Vet Casebook. First aired in April 2018

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies sets Aisling Bea, Bob Mortimer, Mark Watson, Nish Kumar and Sally Phillips brilliantly bewildering tasks, including basketball without hands

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Self-confessed nerd and Star Wars fan Lachlan and south London supermarket worker Luke return to the restaurant for another pair of blind dates, after things didn't work out last time. Will it be second time lucky when they meet Becca and Shannon? Meanwhile, it may be tough finding love for people wrapped up in the nine to five, but young professionals Louisa and Cameron leave thoughts of the daily grind at the door when they meet for their date, and 42-year-old Dan and 39-year-old Adam hope to find that certain spark

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David comes to a hard decision about where he's going to live, and Moira is on the receiving end of some unexpected news

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon returns to Texas in disgrace when he discovers his friends tampered with the Arctic expedition data after growing tired of his quest for a scientific breakthrough. Elsewhere, Leonard becomes frustrated as constant interruptions hamper his attempts to woo Penny

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Dre is chosen to lead Stevens & Lido's new charity campaign helping people give back to their community, but when Rainbow points out there's more to giving back than writing cheques, he donates some of his clothes to a man in need. Andre Jr fails his driving test, so Ruby offers to act as chaperone when he takes the twins out on a trip

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Dre is diagnosed with type 2 diabetes, but after talking to Pops he becomes determined to cure himself. Meanwhile, Jack is convinced that baby DeVante hates him, so he enlists Andre Jr and Diane's help to win over his little brother

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben learns that is it all his fault that Riley does not like celebrating her birthday. He plans a surprise to make it up to her but, in typical fashion, disaster ensues. Gordon finds owner Tina's work to save the eatery from oblivion is frequently ruined by the behaviour of her brother, a tyrannical front-of-house manager whose violent temper constantly undermines staff morale

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Rainbow struggles to adjust when she returns to work at the end of her maternity leave and faces the combined challenges of domestic and professional life. Meanwhile, Ruby gives the twins a 'workaround' plan to get out of doing their homework

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: When Dre's sister Rhonda comes to town, Ruby has a talk with both of her children about their inheritance. Rainbow's sister Santamonica also pays a visit and hires Andre Jr to work as her assistant

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben and Riley try to make the difficult transition from friends to being a couple, which leads to an embarrassing moment for Riley. Elsewhere, Tucker helps Danny to get over his failed relationship. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Riley begins to wonder whether Ben owes it to himself to give family life with Angela and baby Emma a chance, while Bonnie tries to keep her age a secret when she dates a much younger man. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau, Chelsea Kane and Derek Theler

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon wins a grant to pay for a summer expedition to the North Pole, and invites his friends to join him. However, the gang's imminent departure causes Leonard and Penny to reconsider their feelings for each other. Johnny Gale and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon returns to Texas in disgrace when he discovers his friends tampered with the Arctic expedition data after growing tired of his quest for a scientific breakthrough. Elsewhere, Leonard becomes frustrated as constant interruptions hamper his attempts to woo Penny

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam gets between Murray and Marvin when they go without him to the Philadelphia Thanksgiving Day parade to see KITT from TV show Knight Rider. Beverly invites Lainey and Bill to Thanksgiving dinner so that Barry won't split his time between two households, but her plans soon go awry. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta takes part in an undercover FBI operation that ends in a mass arrest. But when one of the mobsters escapes he enlists Boyle's help in tracking him down. Captain Holt tests the squad's patience with practice drills in which Sgt Jeffords plays different roles, while Gina pleads with Boyle to keep a secret. US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Captain Holt is taken by surprise when his long-time nemesis, Deputy Chief Madeline Wuntch (guest star Kyra Sedgwick), arrives to carry out an inspection of his precinct. Peralta and Jeffords test the boundaries between 'work friendship' and 'real friendship' while they investigate a stabbing at a trendy milk bar. Boyle searches for a guest to take to his ex-wife's engagement party - will Diaz come to the rescue?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon uses his holidays to help Amy in her biology lab, but moans about the menial jobs he is given - until she asks him to dissect a brain. Penny grows curious about Leonard's attitude to marriage when Bernadette asks Howard to sign a pre-nuptial agreement

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Raj and Howard devise a contest to decide whether Sheldon or Kripke should get Professor Rothman's vacant corner office. Meanwhile, Penny receives the gift of a painting from Amy to celebrate their friendship, but discreetly tries to dispose of it with help from Bernadette

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny feels threatened when a sexy actress, who has landed a role in TV series CSI, moves into the apartment building, and gradually begins to sense that her friends are being manipulated by the new arrival. Comedy, starring Kaley Cuoco, Valerie Azlynn, Johnny Galecki and Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Inspired by the Karate Kid films, Adam and the other Adam Goldberg decide to face off in a karate match to settle their long-running feud once and for all. Later, Barry and Adam ask Uncle Marvin for some martial arts training - but the only thing they learn is how to do his cleaning

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After Barry starts checking out the best medical schools, Lainey reveals she has won a scholarship to art college. Erica and Adam start to suspect that Murray loves the family dog Lucky more than them

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Boyle go on an eight-day stakeout, which puts a strain on their friendship. Meanwhile, Jeffords uses Santiago and Gina for inspiration when he writes a book about his daughters, and Captain Holt's nephew visits Brooklyn and makes an instant impression on Diaz. Comedy, guest starring Kyra Sedgwick and Nick Cannon

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The team visits Boyle's beach house on a detectives-only getaway, but Peralta ruins the fun by inviting Captain Holt along. The host helps Diaz to send romantic texts to her new boyfriend Marcus, while Gina amuses herself by trying to get Santiago drunk. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.desc: The couples have dinner with their loved ones. Charlene has to survive dinner with her meddling mother-in-law, and things are not improving for troubled couple Gab and Nasser

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny tells the girls she is unsure about her relationship with Leonard and is considering breaking up with him, but when Sheldon finds out, he tries his best to change her mind. Meanwhile, on the International Space Station, Howard is being bullied by the other astronauts. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon hires an attractive female assistant, but when she becomes interested in Leonard, Penny decides to mark her territory by sleeping with him. Meanwhile, Howard starts to lose his mind when his return from space is delayed another week. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons

Back home, Sheldon doesn't know how to act after Amy tells him she wants them to take a relationship break

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Mayim Bialik and Johnny Galecki

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: First Dates

Dean's dream of dating a redhead looks set to become true when he meets flame-haired estate agent Kate, while 49-year-old Thomas - whose last date ended in heartbreak - is hoping it will be second time lucky when he sits down with sexual health nurse Colin

programme.title: Rick and Morty

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel the length of Britain turning unwanted junk into profit for their owners. In this episode they're on the south coast, where Henry gets to work an aircraft fuel tank while Simon gets obsessed with an iconic '60s speedboat

programme.desc: The probate researchers solve a 20-year-old case and reveal the story of a pilot who died in the final days of the Second World War. Plus, semi-retired weather presenter Michael Fish discovers his family history and learns he is the heir to an unclaimed estate

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton visits rural Northamptonshire, where new couple Rob and Jan want to build a vicarage-style home to carry them into retirement. Rob and Jan aren't big on decision-making, and it remains to be seen whether Charlie will succeed on getting them to agree on anything

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at BnB at 43 in Richmond, North Yorkshire, where Jenny and Johnny Hatch hope their guests will enjoy a home-from-home experience

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Dazzling decor and cleanliness concerns give guests opposing views of Sutton Park in Blackpool, before a breakfast buffet comes under scrutiny in the morning

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: For the third visit this week, the group head to Edburton in West Sussex, and Tottington Manor, where owners Debra and Jamie Tombs claim to offer the 'Manor House' experience

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay is at Flynn's Pub and Guesthouse in Hackney, east London, run by friends Serena and Kelly, who pride themselves on having clean and stylish rooms

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It is the final day and the B&B owners meet for the last time to settle some scores. Jenny and Johnny want to get to the bottom of the stain on Kelly and Serena's stay

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien turns car seats into a three-piece suite during a trip to Leyland, while Henry Cole repurposes an overhead light into a fashionable light box

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Chester Zoo's hornbills have survived a fire that swept through their home, but it may have derailed their plans for chicks, while meerkat matriarch Huskie seems to have lost her breeding instincts after losing her solitary pup nine months ago. Is she finally ready to be a mum again? Sun bear Milli already has her paws full bringing up her feisty daughter Kyra. However, the one-year-old's cuteness belies her devilish and destructive nature

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: As the beginning of autumn arrives, Dick Strawbridge passes on his conker skills to the family, before the serious business resumes and the next phase of the renovation begins. Dick and his wife Angel Adoree get to work converting the old tack room into a grand entrance way. Angel knocks down walls and upcycles an old glass door, while Dick lays a new concrete floor

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of Mimi and Andre d'Costa, who have moved to the Kent countryside to bring up their two children. They have a large plot of land and want to build a house that will be functional enough to serve their young family, but will also blend in with the beautiful landscape. They turn to architect Nick Eldridge, who designs a simple modular home using state-of-the-art materials and technologies

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: Two years ago, George meets Armin and Amifa, whose dark and dingy 1920s house in Bellingham, south east London, was not just ugly - the DIY extension added by former owners had been condemned and the makeshift kitchen was an accident waiting to happen. Architect Carl Turner did what he could with the £80,000 budget, but in the end the upstairs was left unfinished. George now returns to see how Armin and Amifa have tackled the top floor

programme.title: Paramedics: Britain's Lifesavers
programme.desc: As the UK enters its fourth week of lockdown, West Midlands Ambulance Service comes to the aid of the staff of care homes, who are feeling forgotten as the virus claims the lives of so many residents. It falls on crews like Julie and Adam to provide help and reassurance. Back in the control centre, Irum has had fast-track training and is plunged into the stark realities of her new role, while a national minute's silence for NHS and care workers holds a particular significance for her

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A five-year-old is rushed into St George's struggling to breathe, and her mum reveals how she has spent months in Great Ormond Street Hospital after being diagnosed with a rare form of juvenile arthritis. Meanwhile, an 83-year-old man in a confused state arrives in A&E after falling over, and as doctors carry out tests and a CT scan, his wife helps them understand the reason behind his confusion. Plus, a twelve-year-old girl must be brave as she undergoes treatment for a nasty cut on her leg

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, as Jon Richardson and Jayde Adams compete against Sean Lock and Joe Wilkinson. David Baddiel joins Countdown's resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner and Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke

Architect Carl Turner did what he could with the £80,000 budget, but in the end the upstairs was left unfinished. George now returns to see how Armin and Amifa have tackled the top floor

programme.title: Food Unwrapped

Kate Quilton is in Hawaii to investigate the potentially dangerous levels of mercury in tuna, and Matt Tebbutt finds out why the bags of ice cubes in supermarkets are so crystal clear

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: In this bite-sized episode, Kirstie Allsopp plans to surprise her guests with two main courses - roast beef with mulled wine gravy, and masala cauliflower with coconut stuffing for the vegetarians

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit Surrey and Middlesex. Henry restores a pair of racing go-karts to race against restorer Guy, and Simon repurposes an old butcher's block into a coffee table

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole refurbishes a classic Ford Mustang and a neon garage sign, while Simon O'Brien restores a classic Chopper bicycle and turns a bass guitar into a chair

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The probate researchers try to track down the relatives of a Liverpudlian woman, and uncover the surprising connection between the site of a Welsh school and a former president of America. Plus, the details of unclaimed estates for which heirs still need to be found

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton heads to Woking in Surrey to meet Jason and Philippa, who believe they have discovered the perfect refurb project. The couple plan to redevelop a house by demolishing half of it and camping in the remaining shell while the new place grows around them. Jason is driven to the brink working every waking hour, while their budget teeters on the edge due to a drop in household income

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at the Unicorn Inn in Ludlow, Shropshire, where husband and wife team Lee and Zoe Osbourne hope their glamorous fairy-tale style rooms will impress

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay of the week is at the Shawries Hotel in Blackpool, where the dated decor takes two guests back to their childhood and breakfast is a build-your-own sandwich platter

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Cameras follow adolescent babirusa Tolo, who lives with his devoted mother Sula. They are very close, enjoying mud baths and pedicures together. But Sula has a hoof problem so they must be separated for the vet to intervene, and keepers are concerned for Tolo's wellbeing in her absence. Meanwhile, laid-back rock hyraxes Daissie and her partner Nungu are expecting their eighth litter. With the birth imminent, the couple's life of ease could be a thing of the past

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Before winter arrives, Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree take on their next project, transforming a 35-foot long, eight-ton river boat into luxury guest accommodation. While Angel completely overhauls the old nautical interior with bespoke fabrics and unique crafts, Dick has the small task of installing the boat's very own wind turbine and a decking that reaches over the moat

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud revisits Francis and Karen Shaw to asses whether their efforts to save a peel tower in the heart of the Yorkshire Dales paid off. While the project was a chance to fulfil a childhood dream, the building's ancient status meant it was protected by numerous regulations. When the couple finally managed to get through the red tape, new and unexpected setbacks jeopardised the project and sent the budget spiralling out of control

programme.desc: Documentary following the Countryfile presenter as he and his family come to the rescue his parents' farm in the Durham hills after his mother suffers an accident

programme.desc: Paramedics attend a suspected domestic assault and need to treat one man who claims he was punched and knocked unconscious. A rare genetic disease leaves a woman with a dislocated shoulder and in excruciating pain, and a man, who in the past has threatened the emergency services with a weapon, calls for an ambulance

programme.title: Food Unwrapped

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun

With so much choice, which will prove to have the biggest wow factor to become their new home in the southern hemisphere?

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Nantwich and Stoke-on-Trent, where Henry comes across a 1960s moped, and Simon restores an early Mirror Dinghy

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The probate researchers look into the case of a former member of the Royal College of Surgeons, and race to discover the rightful owners of his inheritance. The team also investigates the case of a woman whose father was a famous pigeon fancier. Plus, details of some unclaimed estates requiring heirs

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton visits rural Cambridgeshire, where Darren and Luisa are building a picture-perfect waterfront home. However, problem after problem threatens to scupper the build and the couple struggle to delegate. Charlie has to deliver some hard home truths to ensure the project doesn't meander forever or leave the couple bankrupt and with nowhere to live

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

Nick and David count the costs and serve up some suspicions at dinner. A long wait for breakfast leaves the guests grumbling, and Tamsyn and Roman find their feedback hard to stomach

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to The Buxted Inn in Uckfield, East Sussex, run by Nick Bolton and chef David Kirby, and where the focus is on food and wine. Lisa is charmed by the character of the place, but Farid and John think it has a corporate feel. At breakfast, a menu misunderstanding leaves Farid with more than he bargained for

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole visit the Cotswolds, where they unearth a mystery item that looks like a fish tank, but turns out to have a very different use entirely

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Documentary revealing the hidden lives of the animals of Chester Zoo. The Asian elephant family welcome a new arrival. Grumpy matriarch Thi has been pregnant for almost two years and is reaching the end of her tether. She's given birth to a stillborn baby in the past, so the keepers have a close eye on her. Cameras also follow Red panda Jung, who has been getting the cold shoulder from his partner Nima since they had two cubs

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree help British people making French castles their home or running businesses from them. In the opening episode, the duo give Johnny a crash course in the dos and don'ts of chateau shopping before he and his wife start the search for their own dream place. Jonathan and Michael, who are struggling to turn their magnificent French castle into a money-making venture, explore some of their chateau's caves in the hope of finding a buried fortune. Plus, Phil and Angelina struggle to pitch their chateau as the perfect place for a 50th wedding anniversary party when they can't see eye to eye themselves

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: An update on Kelly and Masoko Neville, who built an oak-framed, straw-baled hexagonal home in the Cambridgeshire Fens in 2005. The unusual two-storey house was built around a spiral staircase carved out of an 800-year-old tree trunk, the centrepiece of an interior that drew inspiration from JRR Tolkien's The Hobbit. Kevin McCloud visits the Nevilles to see if they have managed to find the idyllic, self-sufficient life they craved

programme.title: The Good Fight
programme.desc: The firm is hired for a consultation on ways to attract more African-American voters to the Democratic Party. Diane discovers important court documents are missing. Legal drama, starring Christine Baranski, Cush Jumbo and Delroy Lindo

programme.title: The Tudors
programme.desc: A lethal plague dubbed 'the sweats' devastates England. While Anne falls ill and is sent home to her father, Wolsey uses the epidemic as an excuse to send his adversaries away from London. Meanwhile, Henry hopes his case for divorce will advance, but it's clear that his subjects aren't quite so keen to see his marriage end. Drama, starring Jonathan Rhys Meyers

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Twenty-two-year-old motorcyclist Adam is brought into A&E after crashing into a car and being thrown 30 metres. He has possibly injured his neck and spine, and doctors are concerned that he may be at risk of losing his foot due to his severe leg injuries. Meanwhile, a 78-year-old former nurse arrives in St George's after becoming dizzy at her sewing class, and doctors worry she has had a stroke. Plus, 18-year-old Rosa is treated after falling off her bike on the way home from a night out with friends

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, as Jon Richardson and Michelle Wolf take on guest captain Jonathan Ross with Johnny Vegas. Three-man comedy act Pappy's joins Countdown's resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner and Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: The doctors stop at nothing to help their patients, following a shocking realisation that prompts a change in the hospital. Meanwhile, Reynolds must make an important career decision. Medical drama, starring Ryan Eggold

programme.title: The Good Fight
programme.desc: The firm is hired for a consultation on ways to attract more African-American voters to the Democratic Party. Diane discovers important court documents are missing. Legal drama, starring Christine Baranski, Cush Jumbo and Delroy Lindo

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton visits Israel to find out about the mystery ingredient that makes icing sugar so light, fluffy and powdery, while Jimmy Doherty is in Italy to investigate the difference between risotto and long-grain types of rice. Matt Tebbutt discovers that one sandwich maker has come up with an innovative - and surprising - way of putting waste bread to good use

programme.title: Hurricane Man

programme.desc: Mike finds a way to get his hands on a must-have Lambretta scooter, but it isn't the only prize lurking in the yards and warehouses of Alabama

programme.desc: Ricky Grover, Steph and Dom from Gogglebox, Union J, Shappi Khorsandi, Dave Gorman, Katy Brand and Charlotte Hawkins take part in Ipswich

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: As Mike and Frank continue their pick through Alabama, Danielle finds them a collector with a shocking stash of high voltage oddities

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: Celebrity Storage Hunters

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and James May pay tribute to Saab, the Swedish car manufacturer that created several successful models since the late 1940s, but has now ceased production. Richard Hammond takes the passenger's seat in a Skoda rally car that races a rocket-propelled flying man, and actor Matt Smith gets behind the wheel of the Reasonably Priced Car. Jeremy also shreds the tyres of the noisy Maserati GranTurismo MC Stradale and the 510bhp Mercedes-Benz C63 AMG Black Series

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May test the KTM X-Bow, the Morgan Three Wheeler and the Caterham R500 at Donington Park racing circuit. Jeremy also creates his own version of the Battle of Britain using an aircraft-engined Bentley and a flame-spitting BMW

programme.title: Rick Stein: From Venice to Istanbul
programme.desc: The chef continues his journey through Croatia and savours the native oysters of Ston, before crossing the border into Albania, where he is joined by his son Jack and the pair sample local dishes such as chicken jufka and kokoretsi. In his own kitchen on the Greek island of Symi, Rick cooks traditional Albanian dishes, including Lepur Comlek and Tave Kosi

programme.title: Top Gear

programme.desc: The chef continues his 900-mile road trip from Venice to Istanbul, sampling that array of gastronomic delights that lie on the route. In his Symi island kitchen, Rick rolls up his sleeves to prepare galaktoboureko, a dessert of semolina custard in filo pastry, a favourite dish in Greece

programme.title: Top Gear

programme.title: The Misadventures of Romesh Ranganathan
programme.desc: Romesh Ranganathan spends a week exploring Colombia with a local radio host and journalist, discovering how much of the country's reputation for violence is justified. He investigates a new trend for narcotourism, where visitors seek out places associated with drug lord Pablo Escobar, and finds out how Colombians feel about foreigners' fascination with their nation's most infamous criminal. He also visits a Jesus statue shop, learns to make coffee the traditional way, and discovers a game involving explosions

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: The incredible efforts to ensure that the hastily constructed temporary fix around the damaged reactor at Chernobyl becomes a permanent solution, known as the New Safe Confinement

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: How a team of intrepid engineers keep the London Array, one of the largest offshore wind farms on the planet, maintained and producing electricity whatever the weather

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: Dramatised account of 19th-century serial killer Mary Ann Cotton, aka the Black Widow, who travelled around the north east of England, and murdered men for the life insurance

programme.title: History Hunters
programme.desc: Documentary following father-and-son duo Dave and Steve Nuwar, who run a military antiques business. In the first edition, Dave takes a gamble when he makes one of his most expensive purchases ever. And with finances tight, the team head to Stratford fair to try and sell some treasures

programme.title: History Hunters
programme.desc: Dave and Steve spot something special at auction, but they're not the only ones on the trail of this First World War pilot's logbook

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael starts his journey in Chapeltown, Sheffield, following what was once known as the North Country Continental service, and finishing in the engineering centre of Doncaster

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels from Gainsborough to Ely, along the way learning about a Victorian machine that changed shopping for ever and the poet Alfred Tennyson

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on the final leg of his journey following the route of the North Country Continental service. Along the way he meets volunteers on the Mid-Suffolk Light railway and is permitted to drive 'The Middy'. In Leiston, Michael uncovers the world's first purpose-built assembly line, while in Ipswich the work of a young Victorian engineering prodigy impresses the ex-politician. At his destination of Harwich the presenter discovers how the port became a gateway to the continent, only to be superseded by a new deep-water port further inland

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo begins a journey across Ireland, starting in the port of Wexford, where he takes to the seas in a 100-year-old lifeboat and discovers a hero of the American navy

programme.title: The Architecture The Railways Built
programme.desc: Tim Dunn is in Windsor to find out how two rail companies fought to be first to get to Queen Victoria. He also explores the stunning Connel Bridge in the Scottish Highlands

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A towering structure with an explosive past, a deserted cityscape, a mysterious top-secret facility and a vast Nazi construction

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A devastated cliff-top ruin, an extraordinarily tall tower, a concrete structure stranded at sea and a heavy metal monster in a field all feature

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine
programme.desc: The decade of propaganda, impassioned speeches, newspaper articles, posters and campaigning that all led to one moment - Hitler being made Chancellor of Germany in January 1933

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The Allied offensive in the Pacific, where America's two-pronged attack led to heavy casualties on both sides, as the Japanese mounted a ferocious defence. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: At Trinity College, Dublin, Michael Portillo discovers one of Ireland's greatest treasures, and also explores the house and gardens of Powerscourt in County Wicklow

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo continues his journey across Ireland, travelling from Navan to Mullingar. Along the way, he gets up to speed with modern archaeology in County Meath, where he uncovers a controversial Victorian dig at the sacred Hill of Tara. Later, he investigates leaping salmon in Leixslip, and in Mullingar, bangs the drum for the town's traditional marching band

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: A historic Frazer Nash car must be fixed before a big race. Plus, the first car to go round the track is resurrected but will the museum director be able to drive it?

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Nothing screams 1970s more than a Mk3 Ford Cortina 2000E. Derek Mathewson heads to Brigg to value a 1974 example with classic Coke bottle styling and a sweet Pinto engine

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A Cold War Soviet classic goes under the hammer. Built like a tank, the Moskovitch gets few admirers for style, but finds a loving home with a fan of Eastern Bloc classics

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Margaret comes into money, Victor tries to help a Dutch girl get back on her feet, and builders arrive to start the loft conversion, leaving chaos in their wake. Comedy, guest starring Christopher Ryan (The Young Ones), with Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor receives an unlikely job offer that paves the way to disaster, and Margaret plays Cupid to Nick Swainey and a nurse. Meanwhile, the Meldrew household is plagued by a malfunctioning shower, marauding rugby players and a seemingly endless supply of frozen veg. Guest starring John Bird

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Domestic disharmony ensues for the Meldrews as a routine trip to the garden centre starts a trail of turmoil including a scowling snowman, a laughing policeman and a mysterious saboteur. Christmas edition of David Renwick's comedy from 1994, starring Richard Wilson, Annette Crosbie and Angus Deayton

programme.title: The Railway: First Great Western
programme.desc: As rugby union's Six Nations Championship kicks off in Cardiff, train manager Jodie Edwards and her team try to get thousands of fans home after the match. Penzance in Cornwall remains shut off from the rest of the network as engineers work around the clock to get services running through Dawlish, where the line was washed away, while new duty manager Joe has his hands full on his first Saturday night shift at London's Paddington station when the last Wales-bound train of the evening has a problem

programme.title: The Railway: First Great Western
programme.desc: Cheltenham Spa station manager Richard Morrish braces himself for a hectic four days with the two-platform station used by more than 60,000 horse racing fans during the Cheltenham Festival. Just as the mainline at Dawlish is about to be reopened after being washed away in the winter storms, a crack is discovered in the sandstone cliffs two miles down the line and a landslide threatens to engulf the tracks. Conductor Jameil and driver Gary have to react quickly on the Reading to Gatwick service when a pedestrian takes a perilous short cut

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys

programme.desc: Margaret comes into money, Victor tries to help a Dutch girl get back on her feet, and builders arrive to start the loft conversion, leaving chaos in their wake. Comedy, guest starring Christopher Ryan (The Young Ones), with Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor receives an unlikely job offer that paves the way to disaster, and Margaret plays Cupid to Nick Swainey and a nurse. programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Domestic disharmony ensues for the Meldrews as a routine trip to the garden centre starts a trail of turmoil including a scowling snowman, a laughing policeman and a mysterious saboteur. Christmas edition of David Renwick's comedy from 1994, starring Richard Wilson, Annette Crosbie and Angus Deayton

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: Rene is told he must recover the paintings from the Communist Resistance headquarters, so he disguises himself as a Franciscan vicar and sets off with Mimi in a pram, disguised as a baby. programme.desc: As the deadline approaches for the reopening of the mainline at Dawlish, a 300-strong army of engineers works 24 hours a day to keep to the timetable. At London's Paddington station, a train with a Pullman silver service dining car is being prepared, with the onboard team pulling out all the stops to impress food writer Regula Ysewijn, who is researching an article. Elsewhere, North Cotswolds station manager Theresa - known as the 'smiling tiger' for the way she runs her stations firmly and with great care and dedication - keeps a watchful eye on the line between Oxford and Hereford, which carries the highest proportion of first-class ticket holders on the network

programme.title: The Day When

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo arrives in Croydon, where he hears the story of a mixed-race composer who was once celebrated but is now forgotten. programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys

Arriving in the resort of Southsea, Hampshire, Michael heads for the King's Theatre, where he treads the boards in a community production of Lads in the Village. In the New Forest, Michael searches out some unsung heroes of the First World War - the ponies who became war horses - and hears their story from a commoner who runs a stable and riding school.
