programme.desc: The rounding up of escaped pythons in Florida, the making of Panama hats, and how drivers are kept safe in the world's longest tunnel

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike Brewer bags an American classic, Chevrolet Corvette Stingray - but it has only been part-restored, so it is up to mechanic Edd China to complete the job

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Big
programme.desc: The presenter explores some of the world's biggest structures, machines and vessels. In the first episode, he explores Volkswagen's giant car plant in Wolfsburg, Germany, where he checks out its futuristic technology and discovers how this mega-factory works

programme.title: American Chopper
programme.desc: Paul Jr is stunned when his father serves him with another lawsuit. Rumours circulate of a crisis at OCC's HQ, while in the shop, Paul Sr's team is unable to agree on its new build

programme.title: Goblin Works Garage
programme.desc: The team takes on its first ever EV build as its members attempt to mount a Tesla battery-powered electric powerplant inside a classic - the Cinquecento or Fiat 500

programme.title: Mighty Ships
programme.desc: Documentary considering the challenges that faced constructors of Crystal Serenity, a ship that is consistently voted the world's best cruise liner

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: Wood-burning stoves, ballet slippers and buses: more everyday items are put under the microscope to find out how they are made

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: Robotic arms, tattoos, napkins and concrete pipes: more items are put under the microscope to find out how they were made

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Carl Insley and best friend Sharon are the hosts at Driftwood Luxury Lodges in Dale Abbey in Derbyshire, where they offer a luxury glamping experience. The stylish home-made furniture is a hit, although one camper notices it might not be very practical, and while the continental breakfast is a hit with one couple, others find it hard to swallow

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: As the summer comes to an end, two British sailors get shipshape for a big inspection. The dream comes to fruition for B&B hosts in Spain, and two new brewers in France risk being a victim of their own success as the beer barrels run dry

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Joanne and Dean from Hertfordshire have been together for six years and have been enjoying holidays in Tenerife ever since. They love it so much that they've decided to take the next step and buy their very own holiday home in Costa Adeje, so call upon Ben Hillman to find five properties for them to choose between, within their budget of £150,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Sara Damergi helps sisters Annabel and Victoria, who have a budget of £100,000, to find an accessible apartment on the Costa del Sol, where their parents once owned a holiday home

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Adrian Simpson shows Deborah and Peter Merritt a selection of properties for sale in Tobago. The couple downsized in the UK, and have decided to invest £300,000 in a holiday home on the breathtaking Caribbean island close to Trinidad

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Driving instructor Ray Dodd hosts the first dinner party in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, but finds his guests a difficult crowd to please. Recruitment executive Michelle Watson turns her nose up at the salmon starter, while choir director Joseph Benneh sends his steak back to the kitchen

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Recruitment executive Michelle Watson welcomes the diners to her home for the second dinner party of the week in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, but the previous night's host Ray Dodd is hungry for revenge following stinging criticism of his efforts. Michelle's cooking also fails to impress Joseph Benneh, so her hopes of scooping the week's prize rest with her choice of entertainment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Stuart Henson hosts a safari-themed dinner party on the third night in Milton Keynes. He hopes his exotic menu of zebra steak and 'elephant dung surprise' will please his guests, but after the insults of the previous night he faces a difficult challenge to persuade his fellow diners to get along

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Choir director Joseph Benneh hosts the fourth dinner party in Milton Keynes, hoping the flavours from his homeland Ghana and a vocal masterclass will prove a winning combination. The guests' expectations are high, so he is under pressure to hit the spot with a menu that includes chicken liver pate, and groundnut soup with coconut rice

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Country enthusiast Susan Rogers hosts the final dinner party in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, hoping her French cuisine will win her extra points. She also demonstrates her skills with an accordion and gives her guests an origami masterclass, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to West Nyack, New York, to come to the aid of a family-run Mexican restaurant that is suffering a financial crisis, and a case of hard-headed patriarchy. When the chef arrives he finds himself turfing out the existing customers for their own safety due to a cockroach infestation on the premises

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jane and Martin want a holiday home in the town of Portimão in the Algarve - but Ben Hillman needs to find properties suitable not only for the couple but their beloved dog Bailey

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps Angela and Steve from Leicestershire search for a second home in Lanzarote that they can move to permanently after retirement, with a budget of £225,000

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets a 17-year-old builder who has transformed a narrowboat into a floating holiday home, and a bride-to-be who has bought a disused burger van with the intention of turning it into a mobile bar for her wedding reception. George's Spanish tour continues with a visit to a snail-shaped house in the mountain valleys of Aragon

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick and Angel Strawbridge turn their attentions to the wash house - a shell of an old stone building on the far side of the moat. They have visions of turning it into a bathroom for their 40-foot boat on the moat, complete with all eco-friendly mod cons. And it's not long before the whole family get to work clearing the overgrown site so the project can begin

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: The police investigate an apparently unprovoked attack that has left a man fighting for his life after being shot in the chest at point blank range by a complete stranger. As Bedfordshire Police's Guns & Gangs unit comes under increasing pressure to catch the shooter before he strikes again, a woman arrives at Luton police station to report being threatened by a man who matches the description

programme.title: Passengers (2016)
programme.desc: A spacecraft transporting thousands of people to a distant planet malfunctions. As woken travelling companions Jim Preston and Aurora Lane fall in love, they are soon on a collision course with more technical problems and a dark secret. Sci-fi drama, starring Jennifer Lawrence, Chris Pratt and Michael Sheen

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Matt Lucas hosts as TV presenter Stacey Dooley, Little Mix's Jade Thirlwall, comedian Katherine Ryan and internet influencer KSI show off their baking skills. They serve up cocktail-flavoured fondant fancies, have their knowledge of pastry tested in the technical and in the showstopper are asked to create a scene showing something they cannot live without - all from biscuit and meringue. Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith judge their efforts

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer look back at two shows that highlighted the need to get the balance between home and garden just right. In Bury St Edmunds, Lauren Grant believes the opportunity to build on a land she and husband Christian bought from the council will transform their confused downstairs. He, however, just wants rid of the house altogether. Meanwhile, Harrogate couple Carol and Andrew need extra space for Grandad. Can Kirstie build into their sizeable garden or will Phil find somewhere else more suitable?

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Spanish architect Jaime and his wife Mimi as they embark on a mission to convert a Grade II listed folly into a family home in Buckinghamshire. Giving themselves a wildly optimistic six-month deadline to finish before the birth of their second child, it's not long before the couple hit trouble. Jaime puts all his energies and creativity into the project, using innovative 3D mapping to squeeze living spaces into the tower, but it proves to be an exhausting struggle

programme.title: Grayson's Art Club
programme.desc: Grayson and Philippa Perry are joined by actress Jane Seymour from her home in California, where she creates a piece of art on the theme of the week, which is work. Grayson also talks to Ryan Gander about his playful and thought-provoking artworks and there are special contributions from musician Lianne La Havas and comedian Tom Allen

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The hoteliers head to Southport, where husband and wife Rick and Sarah Blaney run the Stamford. However, things do not get off to a great start when Annelies and Claudia are left out in the cold by the self check-in

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A couple from Hull open a family-friendly B&B in a French national park, while two teachers from Kent attempt to turn a piggery into a restaurant in the Spanish desert

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps a couple who run a pub-restaurant in County Durham to find a home on the Greek island of Kefalonia on a budget of £120,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Sara Damergi helps Irene Evans search for a home in western Andalusia, Spain, within commuting distance of Gibraltar, where she hopes to find work as a paralegal. She has decided to leave the UK after a tumultuous few years and has a budget of £90,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Adrian Simpson meets Colin and Veronica Moore, who want a holiday home in St Lucia where they can escape the British winters, so he searches the Caribbean island for properties on a budget of £200,000

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Barber Kenny Flynn hosts the first dinner party in Liverpool. His evening has a 'big kids' theme, so he prepares burger buns striped like a zebra and baby octopuses that resemble spiders. His guests are Nigerian model Cynthia Umezulike, rock music enthusiast Glen Simpson, businessman Rob Spicer and fine-dining enthusiast Jilly Pollock

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Multiple business owner Rob Spicer welcomes the diners to his home for the second party in Liverpool. He is convinced his 'historical leader' theme will be a hit, but there is a shock in store as one of the guests reveals a secret about herself

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Model and barrister Cynthia Umezulike hosts the third dinner party in Liverpool, and hopes her meal including tribal fish, a traditional Nigerian jeloff and an exotic fruit platter will impress her guests

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Rock music enthusiast Glen Simpson hosts the fourth dinner party in Liverpool. He rustles up sticky blackened pork and an Elvis-inspired dessert of deep fat-fried chocolate bars with home-made peanut butter and banana ice-cream, but grievances among the guests threaten to derail the evening's entertainment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Jilly Pollock hosts the fifth and final party in Liverpool, inviting her fellow contestants to a black-tie event. She prepares a selection of self-styled dishes for her diners, including figs, hot beef and berry delight, and hopes an evening of ballroom dancing will ease tensions following the previous night's arguments

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to the upmarket quarter of Hollywood to help the owner of failing health-food restaurant Sante La Brea. As well as struggling to control his disrespectful staff, the proprietor receives a surprise visit from the police at the height of dinner service

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Kelly from Essex would love a holiday home in the Black Sea coastal resort of Sunny Beach in Bulgaria. She's looking for an apartment on a complex, with plenty of facilities and a pool. With a budget of £25,000 and Kelly's best friend Angie coming along to help, will any of Scarlette Douglas's five fantastic properties turn out to be the perfect package?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Married couple Steve and Dawn first visited Mijas on the eastern coast of Spain 11 years ago and have wanted to own a holiday home there ever since. They eventually plan to live in Spain, so the pressure is on for Laura Hamilton to show them five alternate properties within their maximum budget of £220,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: In an updated version of a previous episode, Jasmine Harman meets Bernie and George Wilks, who want to start a new adventure living in the Spanish area of Oliva

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Matt Lucas hosts as TV presenter Stacey Dooley, Little Mix's Jade Thirlwall, comedian Katherine Ryan and internet influencer KSI show off their baking skills. They serve up cocktail-flavoured fondant fancies, have their knowledge of pastry tested in the technical and in the showstopper are asked to create a scene showing something they cannot live without - all from biscuit and meringue. Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith judge their efforts

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, as cameras capture their instant reactions prompted by the week's biggest and best shows, be they entertainment juggernauts, hard-hitting documentaries, news reports or gritty dramas

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, as cameras capture their instant reactions prompted by the week's biggest and best shows, be they entertainment juggernauts, hard-hitting documentaries, news reports or gritty dramas

programme.title: First Dates Hotel
programme.desc: Six-foot gym owner and ex-military man Richard is paired with Emilia. Despite his muscular appearance, he is a sensitive soul who loves musicals and Harry Potter, and his Asperger's leaves him unable to read what others are thinking, so mid-date he is forced to ask Emilia how he is doing. Meanwhile, 40-year-old hotelier Andy arrives at Vesuvius for his first ever date with a man, 37-year-old bouncer Joseph, and police officer Angie hooks up with car salesman Tom, who is determined to leave his stereotypical lad image behind

programme.title: First Dates Hotel
programme.desc: Maitre d' Fred and his team of matchmakers invite more singletons to the luxury hotel in the hope of finding love in the sun. A string of unhappy relationships has left 24-year-old Thalia with a phobia of kissing. Her date with 25-year-old Essex lad Jack date gets off to a great start after a discovery of a shared love of sharks. Widower Tony is looking for someone to share his twilight years and is paired with the glamorous Lesley, a fellow East Ender. However, a surprising differing of political opinions threatens to derail their date

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer look back at two shows featuring families who needed to reconfigure their ground-floor layouts. Graham and Nardeth bought their detached Windsor home 10 years ago, but while he loves Windsor and sees it as their dream home, she is tired of the cramped interior. Enter Kirstie, knocking down walls in the hope of proving the house was worth keeping. Plus, Northamptonshire couple Louis and Isobel are desperate to enjoy their retirement - but it will take a £70,000 refurbishment to reconfigure the ground floor. Even then, will they decide to stay or sell up?

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Documentary set inside Wood Green animal charity, following efforts to match dogs with new owners. Nine-year-old Rohan meets Patterdale terrier puppy Friday, but there are concerns that the hound may be just a bit too enthusiastic for the youngster. Rocco the Jack Russell has been struggling to find a home, though his bouncy exuberance and love of a good face lick means he could be the perfect match for Zach, who is looking for a dog not fazed by his Tourette's. Grant the stray westie has seen some tough times, but his luck might be about to change with the arrival of Casper and Sid

programme.title: The Crystal Maze
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade hosts the game show, inviting TV presenter Laura Whitmore, comedian Chris Ramsey, Diversity dancers Perri Kiely and Jordan Banjo, and former rugby player Gareth Thomas to take his hand and tackle a number of physical, skill, mystery and mental challenges. Their aim is to win the elusive crystals - and the more they get, the more time they get in the Crystal Dome

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mother-and-daughter team Annelies and Claudia Richardson host the week's last visit at the Fauconberg Arms in Coxwold, North Yorkshire. Their ethos is that food is just as important as the rooms, but this threatens to prove their downfall when Rick and Sarah have reservations about cleanliness

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In France, a couple from Hull expand into the bouncy castle business, and in Spain juggling guests and rooms creates havoc at a B&B

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jane and Martin want a holiday home in the town of Portimão in the Algarve - but Ben Hillman needs to find properties suitable not only for the couple but their beloved dog Bailey

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Sara Damergi helps find a suitable property for Mark and Wendy Lang, a couple from Liverpool with a £90,000 budget who want to start a new life on Spain's Costa Almeria

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin shows Jill and Philip Hefford a selection of properties that fall within their £125,000 budget in Clearwater, Florida, where the couple want to buy a decent-sized home for Philip's daughter that can double-up as a winter-time holiday home for themselves

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hairdresser Mushgon Dadfar hosts the first dinner party in the Crewe and Nantwich area of Cheshire, and has high hopes for her Caribbean-themed evening. However, the guests have little time to let their meal settle before they face an energetic Zumba session

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Housewife Pip Massey welcomes the diners to her home for the second dinner party of the week in the Crewe and Nantwich area of Cheshire. As a fortysomething woman who lunches and is used to entertaining, she has high hopes that all those years of practice will make her glamorous evening a success

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Landscape gardener Darren Leech hosts the third dinner party in and around Crewe and Nantwich, Cheshire. He hopes to impress his guests with fine food, including smoked haddock and black pudding, and entertainment that involves laughing at his bottom

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Student Emma Davies hosts the fourth dinner party in the Crewe and Nantwich area of Cheshire, hoping to woo her guests with a creative menu featuring stuffed pork and a home-made gnocchi starter as well as treating them to a musical performance

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hypnotherapist Russell Stubbs hosts the final dinner party in Crewe and Nantwich, Cheshire, hoping to impress his guests with a rock-night theme. In a bid to improve his chances of claiming the £1,000 prize, he prepares a meal using British produce, before the winner is announced

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to La Grange, a suburb of Chicago, to help the owners of Cafe 36, an upmarket bistro threatening to destroy the marriage of its owners due to the scale of their financial losses. The head chef's attitude to quality control is driving customers away, and it is up to Gordon Ramsay to turn the business around

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin meets holistic therapist Daniela from East Yorkshire, who is looking to find a property on the coastline of western Madeira to live with her two rescue dogs. She wants a property with sea views, lots of outside space and the potential for a therapy room. With Daniela's budget of £100,000 and her mother Janet by her side to help, Jonnie Irwin lines up five options for her to choose between

Meanwhile, 40-year-old hotelier Andy arrives at Vesuvius for his first ever date with a man, 37-year-old bouncer Joseph, and police officer Angie hooks up with car salesman Tom, who is determined to leave his stereotypical lad image behind

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Contestants Charlotte Ritchie, Jamali Maddix, Lee Mack, Mike Wozniak and Sarah Kendall vie once more, as Taskmaster Greg Davies presides. On this edition, Lee attempts an audacious hammer throw, Sarah makes sitting down memorable and Jamali forgets his passport. As usual, Alex Horne offers the intrepid contenders moral support

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This edition follows the stories of people who have lived through tragedy and life-changing circumstances, exploring how they've overcome their loss and adapted to the new paths their lives have taken. Steve, 52, is rushed to St George's after falling over and hitting his head on a concrete step, while 21-year-old Fleur is assessed after she woke up with pain and swelling in her leg. Muffy, 72, is brought to Resus with slurred speech and weakness in her legs, and doctors suspect she may have suffered a stroke

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Spanish architect Jaime and his wife Mimi as they embark on a mission to convert a Grade II listed folly into a family home in Buckinghamshire. Giving themselves a wildly optimistic six-month deadline to finish before the birth of their second child, it's not long before the couple hit trouble. Jaime puts all his energies and creativity into the project, using innovative 3D mapping to squeeze living spaces into the tower, but it proves to be an exhausting struggle

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George's continued renovation mission takes him to Moseley and Wheaton Aston in the West Midlands. He begins with a conversion to unite upstairs and downstairs flats in an Arts and Crafts building, although one of his suggestions leaves the owners speechless. He also visits an 18th-century pub that has fallen victim to some dodgy DIY - and quickly devises a clever plan to make the most of the period features

programme.title: Strangers Making Babies
programme.desc: Documentary following single women looking for platonic partners to have children with. Businesswoman Trinity from Essex originally wanted to raise a child on her own, until a health scare made her realise how important it is for a child to have two parents. She is matched with three potential partners. Nanny Venicia and amateur ballroom dancer Sarah also spend more time with the men they have been matched with. The time eventually comes to decide which potential dads-to-be they want to take to the next stage. But could romantic advances get in the way of a co-parenting partnership?

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Rich Kids, Skint Holiday
programme.desc: On a trip to Bridlington with the Spink family, wannabe rock star Jordan struggles to fold his own trousers or open a can of peas, but he also learns that despite their troubles, the cash-strapped Spinks are much closer than his own wealthy family

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Cleaning duo Richard and Brennan take on some of Britain's filthiest and most cluttered homes. They begin with Lincolnshire single mum, Sam, who has dedicated her life to caring for her disabled daughter, leaving no time for cleaning

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Brent Council officers find a severely overcrowded house in north London, while Harrow Council try to help a family forced to sleep in a single room due to leaks coming from the roof. Their landlord is reluctant to complete the work and has instead served them with an eviction notice. Plus, the case of a Birmingham landlord who wants rid of his troublesome tenants, who have not paid rent for more than a year

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: In north London, Harrow council officers investigate an overcrowded property. An inspection uncovers many issues, including an unauthorised loft conversion that is a danger to the tenants who sleep there. A couple in Suffolk agree to rent a property to its former owner, who now refuses to leave, and a single mum tricks her way into a Milton Keynes property, confirming she has paid the deposit having done no such thing

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: An episode combining new and unforgettable past cases. The High Court Enforcement Agents head to Manchester to track down over £5,000-worth of debt, and seize an expensive car in the process. Later in south London, the agents deal with a violent debtor who threatens them with a concealed weapon, and in Liverpool, they are met with lies and aggression from a mechanic who owes nearly £3,000

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: AJ and Richie are in pursuit of a van speeding through narrow country lanes, while Jacko and the team box in a van carrying large quantities of cannabis. Sparks fly when dog handler Justin and police dog Elsa capture two burglars on a building site

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Liam and Ben attempt to catch a gang of late-night burglars, but one of the suspects treats an officer to a face full of saliva, while Jacko and Simon are in pursuit of a car round the streets of Ferryhill, but it's not the interceptors who make the arrest. Meanwhile, Spike tails two suspected burglars in an unmarked car before making a back-street stop and Liam's sniffer dog Louie uncovers large amounts of cash and drugs following an armed raid

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Runaway drivers are convinced to stop by the threat of 50,000 volts, a suspected drink-driver resists arrest and receives a face full of incapacitating PAVA spray, a fresh-faced and uninsured motorist tries to pass himself off as his 52-year-old father

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Vic become party to a fractured family's school fee woes in Staffordshire and Del and Dael need to reclaim £3,500 after a rental van was returned badly damaged. Stewart and Elmor are in Warwickshire, where the members of a household blame their predicament on a scheming landlord whose subsequent arrival sparks a fierce reaction, while Iain helps Stewart remove a young mother from her Lancashire home

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The agents chase almost £3,000 owed by Indian takeaway owners, but when the staff deny any knowledge of the debt, the agents threaten to seize kitchen equipment. In east London they face a race against time to recover more than £8,000 from an electrical services company, and in Cheshire the enforcement agents chase nearly £4,000 of debt owed by a mobile phone shop

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Harlow is caught between her affection for Brent and Paul. Meanwhile, Susan does not know what do with Finn's video diaries, before taking advice from David

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Amber struggles to find a home for her and Jai, Ziggy suspects Amber might run off again. Martha cannot handle everyone preying on her, and asks for some solitude

programme.title: Britain's Parking Hell
programme.desc: In Weston-super-Mare, new restrictions have provoked mixed reactions, while an angry parker and his brother turn the air blue in Edinburgh as they try to find a space for Burns Night. A bodybuilder enrages his girlfriend and angry parents by parking in a parent-and-child space, arguing he is too big to squeeze out of his car in a standard bay

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Nick Wallis examines how CCTV and helicopter cameras mean wrongdoers can no longer hide in a crowd. He highlights the use of such footage to help seal the conviction of a man involved in the August 2011 riots across England, and reports on a state-of-the-art network monitoring a football crowd of 21,000 as Leicester City take on Barnsley

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: A 19-year-old woman comes to Hull Royal Infirmary after falling off a barstool in a pub and landing on her little finger, while a 53-year-old man arrives after blacking out and falling down a flight of stairs in his block of flats. Meanwhile, staff deal with a 34-year-old who has been thrown off his motocross bike in a race and has fractured and dislocated both shoulders

programme.title: 999: Critical Condition
programme.desc: A man with a torn aorta, the main artery in the body, needs urgent medical attention to prevent catastrophic internal bleeding. Meanwhile, a patient is flown into the hospital by helicopter after being involved in a major car accident, and another man is brought in and treated after falling through a skylight in a roof

programme.title: Scream 2 (1997)
programme.desc: A second serial killer adopts the ghost mask and embarks on a campaign of murder, while survivors of the first massacre try to get to the bottom of the terrifying mystery. programme.desc: On a remote seaside village on the coast of Scotland live the Sullivans and their clan of ten. Today is back to school which means running a tight ship to get lunches ready so mum and Dad divide and conquer. Mum takes on bathroom duty upstairs whilst Dad inspects the troops as they head out of the door. By 8:30 mum Emma already feels like she's had a packed day! In Whitstable, Kent the Gale family and their ten kids are proving to be the most popular family on the street when they decide to put up their very own inflatable castle. But it soon descends into chaos as kids and adults get stuck in! In Southampton lives single-mum Sonya and her mega-brood of ten kids. To ease the pressure on her workload Sonya is passing on her culinary skills to eldest daughter Shannon but despite the 17 year old's attempts to stick to the recipe even the delights of a spag bol is not going to keep all of the troops happy. And in Wales the Holloway-Scotts and their ten kids have to prepare for Olivia's pro

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: The story of landlords Pauline and Simon, who bought a property blind with tenants in situ - not realising the difficulties that would ensue. It turned out their tenants were causing havoc in the neighbourhood and had more than a hundred arrests between them for drugs and domestic violence - and if the landlords did not evict them, they themselves could be prosecuted. Plus, a Slough landlord forced to call in an eviction expert when his tenant cut off all communication

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Housing officers in Harrow receive a tip-off about an overcrowded property and when they arrive they find 10 people living in dire conditions and a house that needs extensive emergency work. Squatters in Tottenham invade an elderly woman's home while she is away, ransacking the property and refusing to leave. In Waltham Abbey a seemingly perfect tenant forges her way into a desperate landlord's home, forcing him to move in with his parents while he struggles to evict his unruly occupant

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The agents chase almost £3,000 owed by Indian takeaway owners, but when the staff deny any knowledge of the debt, the agents threaten to seize kitchen equipment. In east London they face a race against time to recover more than £8,000 from an electrical services company, and in Cheshire the enforcement agents chase nearly £4,000 of debt owed by a mobile phone shop

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Bob and BoBo are in pursuit of a clapped-out white van through the back streets, where a dead end brings the vehicle to an abrupt halt and the occupants make off on foot. Martin clocks a driver speeding at more than 100mph, while Kev and rookie Oliver expose a cunning insurance scam

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers swoop on a housing estate searching for suspects involved in a shooting and it needs to be a tightly controlled operation and communication is key between the firearms unit, police helicopters and dog handler Duncan. Elsewhere, Steve responds to reports of a burglary in progress, and ends up on a chase through back gardens. After catching one of the suspects, Steve receives a shock when he returns to check out the burgled house

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Steve is involved in a dangerous high-speed pursuit of a car stolen in a burglary. The fleeing driver ditches and runs, but will the police chopper be able to keep him in their sights? Claire and Tom deal with an abusive drunk driver who is clueless about what he has done wrong, rookie Omar tackles a fence-hopping suspect whose antics have left him with a slashed hand, and Steve tracks down a car suspected of being involved in a robbery

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The agents try to recover more than £12,000 owed by a jeweller to one of his suppliers, but as the tension mounts, the debtor violently lashes out at one of the officers. Meanwhile, agents in London chase up more than £5,000 owed by a tenant to her former landlord for rent arrears, and also attempt to retrieve over £6,000 owed by a property developer

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The officers try to recover £13,000 owed by a high-performance car dealer in Birmingham, and in Wolverhampton the agents chase nearly £2,000 owed to a car hire company. Elsewhere, officers visit a family in Kent to try to collect more than £5,000, but an emotional backstory means they are forced to make a sensitive decision

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Susan's successful vision of Finn brings her some unexpected opportunities to ask questions. Roxy tries to repair her ruined reputation in order to find work again

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Chloe sets up a dinner date between Ari and Mia in secret. Martha anxiously waits for Kieran to arrive, but it remains to be seen whether everything is okay

programme.title: Secrets of Center Parcs
programme.desc: How the Center Parcs holiday sites became the destination of choice for millions of UK families, featuring interviews with former executives and holidaymakers. Company insiders, such as former managing director Peter Moore, reveal the extraordinary story of how a Dutch idea became a British Institution, progressing from a small Dutch campsite in 1968, to a £2.5billion company, which is today a desirable destination for over two million Brits a year. There's a first-hand account from the fire chief who put out the devastating fire at Elveden Center Parcs in 2002, and unique insights from the man who oversaw the building of the very first iconic dome in Sherwood Forest in 1987

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Documentary shining a light on the many and varied reasons why people hoard, bringing in cleaning professionals and house clearance expert to help them. Deep-cleaning experts Caz and Tee arrive to helping clear Paul's cottage in Bath, but with rat droppings in the dining room and maggots in the master bedroom, it's going to be their toughest assignment ever

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Richard and Brennan come to the aid of a grandmother in Oswestry, whose home is so covered in dog fur and dust that it is hard to breathe inside

programme.title: 22 Kids & Counting
programme.desc: Documentary following Noel and Sue Radford as they cope with their supersized family, as well as grandchildren, dogs, teenage parties and home-schooling. In the opening edition, Sue is about to give birth to their 22nd child just as the nation goes into lockdown and when the latest addition arrives home, everyone else in the house must muck in

Horror sequel, starring Neve Campbell, David Arquette and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Two ministers in Liverpool take over an old church with a plan to turn it into a community centre, only to be obstructed by a group of squatters who refuse to leave. Time to call in eviction expert Chris Sharpe. Council officers Shital and Andrew are on the warpath when a neglectful landlord ignores their warnings about fire safety. Northamptonshire landlord Sina visits her property to ask why payments had stopped, only to be faced by an angry and volatile tenant, leaving her scared to return

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: The documentary about landlord and tenancy issues catches up on some of the stories featured so far. Emmanuel reveals what happened after he returned from a year working abroad to find himself £24,000 in mortgage arrears and unable to get into his own property. Andy made a mistake when he rented out his north London home to someone he knew, only for his so-called friend to sublet the property, pocket the profits and pay Andy nothing. What has happened since?

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The officers try to recover £13,000 owed by a high-performance car dealer in Birmingham, and in Wolverhampton the agents chase nearly £2,000 owed to a car hire company. Elsewhere, officers visit a family in Kent to try to collect more than £5,000, but an emotional backstory means they are forced to make a sensitive decision

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Charlie and Wayne are in hot pursuit of a van, but the driver crashes the vehicle and runs off into the night. With the help of a tracker, officers hunt down a 17-year-old suspected of committing a serious robbery, while Matt and Brimmers are on the hunt for the driver of a £300,000 Rolls-Royce who is thought to be under the influence

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Pursued by a helicopter and a team of armed response vehicles, two men armed with machetes and a sawn-off shotgun make a dramatic escape on a motorbike. Meanwhile, officers Clarkie and Nick take two dangerous boy racers off the road, and a high-speed pursuit of alleged burglars turns into a race on foot

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A white van fails to stop and leads officers on night-time pursuit round Halifax, but the chase finally comes to an end with devastating consequences. Sophie finds a drunk driver and his girlfriend on a motorway embankment, having abandoned their car, while Clarkie is forced to use pepper spray after a motorist disappears into some bushes

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In Staffordshire, the agents chase up a £3,000 deposit owed by a landlord to his tenant, and officers in Birmingham try to recover £25,000 from a nightclub owner for unpaid solicitor fees. Meanwhile, agents Max and Paul are in Surrey as they attempt to collect more than £3,000 owed to a garage after a customer disputed the repairs made to his van

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Officers chase £4,500 in court fees in north Wales after a property deal turned sour, and in Birmingham the agents try to collect over £3,500 from a single mum who defaulted on loan repayments. Elsewhere in Worcestershire, the enforcement agents try to recover more than £10,000 from a shop-keeper for fraudulently keeping a deposit during a property sale

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Toadie is concerned when Susan admits she has been speaking to an imagined version of Finn. Dipi and Shane rush Roxy to the hospital

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Tane runs after Ari, while Ziggy comforts Mackenzie. Mia and Ari work out together at the gym. Bella and Nikau concoct a plan to end the infighting between their friends

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Another glimpse into the lives of expats who have left the UK for a new life in the Spanish sun. Former Glaswegian taxi drivers Pete and Kath came to Benidorm to retire, only to end up taking over a bar, while fitness instructor and entrepreneur Anthony has organised a campsite coach trip to the Algar waterfalls. Female impersonator James and his partner David have rented a working farm, and it proves a steep learning curve for the pair who have sunk every penny into the project

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Dr Julian Humphrey and Sister Benita Wainwright treat Phil, who has the rare condition aortic dissection, while Dr Humphrey also tries to put a man's dislocated shoulder into place. Consultant Dr Bharath Reddy and junior Dr George Kay are on standby to treat 14-month-old Heaven, who is rushed in with breathing problems, while volunteer Jane keeps the team and patients fed and watered

programme.title: 999: Critical Condition
programme.desc: A man is rushed in with multiple stab wounds to his abdomen and after the team check whether his organs have been affected, he is rushed in for emergency surgery. Meanwhile, a teenage footballer arrives by helicopter, having lost all sensation below the waist after an accident during a game, and a dairy farmer is wheeled into A&E, having being knocked unconscious by a cow's hoof. Worried about a bleed on the brain, staff fast-track him to CT, aware that any trauma to the brain could affect his ability to do his very physical job

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: The hospital security team is called to reception after a suspected drug user is found passed out on the floor, while ex-factory worker Claude is determined to discharge himself after a bang on the head. Sixty-eight-year-old former fire fighter Stephen is brought in after passing out at home, and blood tests reveal that he has sepsis, an infection that causes more deaths than cancer

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programme.desc: Documentary following emergency response teams on their most extreme medical callouts

programme.title: Skin A&E
programme.desc: The specialist clinic opens its doors to patients with acne, psoriasis and cysts. Dr Natalia Spierings treats 42-year-old Shaneef's shoulder lipoma, Dr Adil Sheraz tackles a large head cyst, and Dr Dev Shah comes under fire over his lack of music knowledge. Plus, psoriasis-sufferer John feels he's exhausted all the options for treatment, but can Dr Emma McMullen offer him a ray of hope?

programme.title: Plastic Surgery Knifemares
programme.desc: The secrets behind dermal lip fillers, investigating how social media and celebs have driven a massive boom in the industry, and looking at just how wrong things can go

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: A young teacher faces prosecution for falsifying test results, and she appeals to Jason for legal aid, claiming she only changed the score to help a student reach their potential

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A US Navy recruitment officer is murdered at a high school and the agents discover he had recently begun a relationship with a married teacher whose wife held a grudge against him. They also find out a student's father was vehemently opposed to his joining the military, and receive help from an unexpected quarter - Ducky's esteemed predecessor, Dr Magnus. Crime drama, guest starring comedian Bob Newhart

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A former serviceman who had been having an affair is beaten to death in his own back garden, and the agents are forced to consider the possibility that his wife - a US Marine and martial arts expert - is the killer. Meanwhile, McGee becomes the subject of an embarrassing mix-up when an inflatable doll apparently purchased on his credit card is delivered. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis re-examine a case closed since the 1960s after a vehicle containing the remains of a murdered man is dredged up from the Hudson River. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis examine the murder of a popular Harlem community leader, while McCoy and Carmichael struggle to prevent a chaotic situation. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston, Jerry Orbach and Steven Hill

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives respond to a hold-up committed by a bloodthirsty team of robbers in ski-masks, and McCoy struggles to determine whether the teenage tearaway found with the criminals was an unwilling hostage or a active participant in the crimes

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A sound-system installer is murdered after supplying goods to a strip club covertly operated by the Mafia, and the finger of blame points to a small-time hoodlum whose crime boss father is serving life imprisonment. The case eventually comes to trial - but investigators are disturbed to hear an untrustworthy government attorney is handling the prosecution. Drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Steven Hill

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A pregnant student is found murdered, and detectives Briscoe and Curtis discover she was strangled to death before being stabbed by the killer in an effort to make the attack seem like the random act of a psychopath. A mathematics professor soon comes under suspicion as eyewitnesses allege he was close to the crime scene on the night in question

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis uncover new evidence as they investigate a 30-year-old rape and stabbing case, but the victim is consumed with fear when confronted with the possibility of another trial for the perpetrator

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The agents are forced to undergo psychological evaluations conducted by Dr Rachel Cranston (guest star Wendy Makkena) while investigating the death of a submarine's commanding officer. Suspicion falls on a journalist seen arguing with the man before his demise, and Tony discovers a link between the psychotherapist shadowing the agents and Ziva's predecessor Kate Todd. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A marine dies while saving the life of a foreign defence secretary, who was the target of an assassination attempt. Gibbs and the team are given the task of protecting the politician's daughter while she studies in America, but fail to stop her being kidnapped and ransomed in a bid to prevent her father signing an important treaty. Crime drama, starring Sean Murray and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A marine's teeth and fingertips are found in a pickpocket's stolen purse, and Ducky discovers he had been tortured on a rack before dying. The agents realise he may have been killed in error, and that the real target was his ex-girlfriend, a skilled player of computer games who unwittingly uncovered a mysterious code. Crime drama, starring Michael Weatherly and Sean Murray

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames are led to a terminally ill bank robber after a man is blown up by what he thought was a fake bomb. The pair discover the crook is planning to take both his own life and that of the accomplice he has enlisted to assist him with his final heist. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate the case of a heart surgeon murdered during his son's bar mitzvah. Although they initially suspect someone with Mob connections, the detectives later discover another man's obsession puts him in the frame for the killing. Drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The father of a wealthy socialite is found dead after threatening to cause problems for the owner of his daughter's favourite nightspot. The club owner seems a likely suspect, but all is not what it seems - he is actually an FBI agent involved in an undercover operation. Starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The investigators find three bodies when they arrive at the scene of an accident involving a truck full of revellers, and find a lead when one of the dead is identified as the daughter of an unpopular trade-union boss. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise, Carmine Giovinazzo and Hill Harper

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigates a series of shootings at a nightclub, where a bartender and two patrons were killed by a hitman, who then proceeded to kidnap someone. Hawes is stunned when the abducted woman is revealed to be Camille Jordanson, a childhood friend who has become embroiled in a messy counterfeit pill scheme and seems to have made a few enemies in the criminal underworld. Guest starring singer Ne-Yo

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick is shocked to find Hank is dating Adalind, a monster he previously encountered, as the search for Aunt Marie's mystical key grows more desperate

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank investigate a string of murders, and learn their chief suspect - a freedom fighter on the run from assassins - is being harboured by Monroe and Rosalee. Guest starring Sebastian Roche

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis hunt for the suspected killer of a parolee - but matters are complicated by the discovery that two bounty hunters are also pursuing their quarry. Acclaimed drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis join forces with their Baltimore colleagues to investigate the murder of a government official. It soon emerges that the deceased had been stalked by a man because of her lesbian affair with a married woman, who pleads for her identity to be kept secret. However, an over-zealous attorney embarks on a crusade to make the information public knowledge, going so far as to take the officers to court in an effort to force them to reveal their source - but his interest in the case raises suspicions

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis try to solve the murder of a college student whose death was depicted in graphic detail on the internet. However, the investigation grinds to a halt when they encounter a lawyer who is unwilling to reveal vital information about her client's past

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Part one of two. A shootout between a motorist and the police leads to the discovery of a body in a car boot - and puts the detectives on the trail of a money-laundering operation run by Russian gangsters. Drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Part two of two. As the case continues, Assistant DA Antonella Ricci and eyewitness Billy Woodson's mother are found dead at a supposedly safe location, killed by Colombian drug-dealers working alongside the Russian gangsters. Drama series, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A gas attack occurs at a subway station, and investigations reveal it bears the hallmarks of a previous incident at a church. Briscoe and Curtis are joined by Baltimore detectives Bayliss and Pembleton, who hope to apprehend the prime suspect in both incidents

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The agents learn one of their former investigative assistants has been murdered, and had been selling information about how to rob a warehouse full of valuable possessions belonging to a woman convicted of fraud. As the case proceeds, Tony becomes infatuated with the new leader of another team, who apparently returns his feelings. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Homicide police hand the case of a retired marine colonel found murdered with an axe over to NCIS when they are unable to solve the case, despite all the circumstantial evidence pointing to the deceased's drug-addicted son. They discover the suspect's mother went missing two years previously and Ziva suggests he may have killed more than one parent, while the family's neighbour is revealed to also have had a motive for wanting the man dead. Crime drama, starring Michael Weatherly and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a marine working for the Defence Intelligence Agency who was blamed for the disappearance of 500 specialised rifles in Afghanistan. A cryptic message found at the scene, written in the victim's blood, leads the agents on the trail of a controversial manuscript that claims to expose the truth about the missing weapons, and an FBI agent with a secret. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: L.A.'s Finest
programme.desc: While fighting with their own personal complications, Syd and McKenna try to find the killer behind the murder of a transgender woman. Syd must face her past as the hunt for Knox intensifies, while McKenna helps Izzy deal with her grief

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A vengeful loan shark kidnaps the family of a financier who owes him money. Unfortunately, Goren and Eames have a tough time proving that an abduction has even taken place, chiefly because the terrified man has been told his daughters will be killed if he talks

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate when a legal clerk is found murdered in a judge's house. The judge, Dutch Blakemore, admits he was having an affair with the victim, and it soon emerges he was plagiarising her work. Drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A serial rapist is murdered and his body is left bound and gagged in the same fashion as the women he attacked. Suspecting the killer may be one of the criminal's former victims, Mac and the team are left with mixed feelings about bringing the culprit to justice. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: An unidentified woman found dead in an alleyway appears to have taken a heroin overdose, but further inspection reveals someone may have had a hand in administering the fatal drugs. Mac recognises the victim as conspiracy-obsessed Tessa James, and as he works to explore whether there was truth in her stories, the investigation leads to an elite gentlemen's club that has traces of blood on the walls. Starring Gary Sinise and Sela Ward

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: A creature is found drowned in wet cement, putting Nick and Hank on the trail of a troll running a protection racket. Meanwhile, Juliette invites Eddie over for dinner to thank him for saving her life. Guest starring David Zayas (Dexter), with David Giuntoli and Russell Hornsby

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: When businessman Arthur Jarvis finds himself in financial difficulty, he approaches his wealthy mother-in-law for financial assistance. She refuses, and shortly afterwards is murdered. When Nick and Hank investigate the case, they discover the culprit to be a bat-like monster, and reveal a marriage bearing eerie similarities to the Cinderella story

programme.desc: Jason finds himself working alone in the run-up to Thanksgiving, as he agrees to help a boxer who is being tried for murder

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Homicide police hand the case of a retired marine colonel found murdered with an axe over to NCIS when they are unable to solve the case, despite all the circumstantial evidence pointing to the deceased's drug-addicted son. They discover the suspect's mother went missing two years previously and Ziva suggests he may have killed more than one parent, while the family's neighbour is revealed to also have had a motive for wanting the man dead. Crime drama, starring Michael Weatherly and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a marine working for the Defence Intelligence Agency who was blamed for the disappearance of 500 specialised rifles in Afghanistan. A cryptic message found at the scene, written in the victim's blood, leads the agents on the trail of a controversial manuscript that claims to expose the truth about the missing weapons, and an FBI agent with a secret. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The officers discover a girl's body in a hospital emergency room, and the subsequent investigation leads to the revelation that she was killed during an unauthorised exorcism carried out by an overzealous nun who claims her behaviour was directed by the voice of an angel. Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The investigation into a fatal attack on a semi-retired divorce lawyer by a disgruntled client reveals a network of bribery and corrupt medical practices. As the team unravels the tangled threads of the case, it appears a trio of doctors may be destined for prosecution - and it is not long before a further murder occurs. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Curtis helps a woman who claims her baby was kidnapped while she was at confession to retrace her steps. However, legal questions begin to appear when her attorney introduces a unique defence. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a man goes on a shooting spree in Central Park, Briscoe and new partner Green pull out all the stops to trace the weapon. McCoy, meanwhile, sets his sights on finding the killer - and the person who sold him the gun. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach, Jesse E Martin and Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the shooting of a civil court judge. Catching the man they think responsible, they bring him to trial - but the victim refuses to implicate him. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a social worker, exposing a racket involving foster children. The resulting trial sees Paul Robinette place the system in the dock as he defends a black woman accused of kidnapping her baby from his adoptive parents. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The agents examine the death of a seaman and find themselves working alongside Barrett. Gibbs makes his displeasure about the circumstances of the case well known, prompting the rest of the investigators to worry that he might be about to leave the NCIS again. Meanwhile, Ziva introduces her new boyfriend to her team-mates. Crime drama, guest starring Enrique Murciano

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Navy lieutenant is found dead in the Pentagon's custodial closet, and surveillance footage indicates she was killed by a co-worker. However, Ziva and the team discover her supposed assailant actually died of a heart attack days before the crime was committed. Meanwhile, suspicions are raised regarding the eyeball left in Tony's drink, and the investigators' attention is fixed on the port-to-port murderer, who appears to still be at large

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Tony's one-time Baltimore PD partner Danny Price is murdered in a manner that suggests the port-to-port killer has struck again. However, a key difference in the way the victim was bound suggests the crime was actually the work of a copycat, forcing the investigators to consider whether Price had any enemies

programme.title: Nothing to Declare

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Doctors discover a Goa'uld larva has attached itself to Kawalsky's brain, and he must undergo a tricky operation to get rid of the creature. Meanwhile, a dubious Colonel Kennedy interrogates Teal'c, who O'Neill wants as a team member. Richard Dean Anderson stars

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: One of the Athosian children accidentally unleashes what appears to be a harmless entity during a game. However, everyone soon begins to realise the mysterious being is anything but innocuous

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Data races to save the life of a youngster stranded on a dying planet - but needs Picard to break the Federation's prime directive if he is to succeed. Sci-fi caper, starring Brent Spiner

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: The residents adapt to the new order aboard the occupied Deep Space Nine, while the war goes badly for Sisko, who is forced to land the damaged Jem'Hadar ship on a remote planet - where he comes across a wounded Vorta

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: Captain Archer and his crew embark on a mission to find out about the mysterious and hostile Xindi race, which was behind the attack on Earth. Sci-fi drama, starring Scott Bakula and Jolene Blalock

programme.title: Lost Girl
programme.desc: Bo and Kenzi go undercover at a college campus to find a missing student, and find a surprising connection when they explore the underworld of the school's sorority system

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Melinda discovers the spirits of three boys and a dog while cleaning out an old inn basement. She learns they were killed in an orphanage fire 50 years earlier and are trapped in the building, now due for demolition - prompting her to help them cross over before they become earthbound for ever

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: A discontented teenage ghost vents his spleen on Melinda when she tries to help him - but in the process, she discovers a secret sure to shock his bereaved loved ones

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Lancelot arrives in Camelot and leaps to Merlin's rescue when he is attacked by a griffin. The warlock learns of the aspiring knight's lack of nobility and fabricates credentials to help his new friend achieve his ambition. However, the ruse is uncovered and Lancelot is thrown in jail. Former Heroes star Santiago Cabrera guests

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Morgana succumbs to a mysterious illness and a new physician arrives in Camelot just in time to cure her. Uther is impressed by the stranger's abilities but Gaius becomes suspicious and enlists the help of his friend Geoffrey of Monmouth to find out more about the newcomer. Guest starring Green Wing's Julian Rhind-Tutt and former Grange Hill actor Michael Cronin

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The dismembered body of a college student is found and the CSIs realise a killer they failed to capture has resurfaced. To make matters worse, he seems to have refined his methods, using a wood chipper to dispose of the bodies. The murderer leaves a trail of grisly clues leading to another corpse and, despite delivering a taunting message saying he will give himself up, he still has another trick up his sleeve

programme.title: Banged Up Abroad
programme.desc: The story of Tom Hanway, who escaped a Chilean jail with a fellow prisoner, only to take a dangerous and fatal escape route across the desert

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team's ship is damaged while fleeing from the Wraith and gets stuck halfway through the Stargate, leaving the crew less than an hour to find a way of dislodging it. To make matters worse, an alien parasite attaches itself to Sheppard's neck and begins to suck the life from him

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: The Delphic Expanse has a distorting influence on space, and predatory aliens cause havoc for the Enterprise crew. Sci-fi drama, starring Scott Bakula and Jolene Blalock

programme.title: Lost Girl

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Melinda helps the spirit of a woman who died in hospital during surgery discover what caused her death. Paranormal drama, starring Jennifer Love Hewitt

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Melinda helps the spirit of an ex-convict who is haunting Jim, causing him to suffer from anxiety and despair for days on end. programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Arthur and Merlin are hunting in the forest when they rescue a man and his beautiful daughter from bandits. The prince is besotted with the girl and offers the pair refuge in Camelot - unaware the object of his affections poses a threat to his life. Guest starring Kenneth Cranham

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: A druid and his boy apprentice are discovered in Camelot and try to avoid capture. The elder is caught and executed, but Merlin hears the juvenile's telepathic cries for help. Despite the Great Dragon's warnings to be wary, Merlin risks his life to protect the youngster, putting Arthur in danger

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom joins forces with day-shift supervisor Sofia Curtis to examine the death of a 17-year-old in a casino penthouse. Louise Lombard (Stargate Universe) makes her first appearance in the cast, alongside William Petersen and Marg Helgenberger

programme.desc: A group of heroes try to stop aliens taking over the universe

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The girls have to babysit Maxine's nephew - who ends up wandering off in a spooky castle where a monster is rumoured to live

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: A super-computer on board a space station kidnaps the girls, intending to use their voices to create a black hole and destroy the world

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Kong: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Kong, Jason, jungle girl Lua, fun-loving Tann and wise Dr. Jenkins take on power-hungry scientists, ferocious prehistoric creatures and incredible magical beings to protect their unique island home

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Gilby and the other children steal the drakkar - but the young captain knows nothing about navigation and soon gets hopelessly lost at sea

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: A phoney sorcerer visits the village, and Vic is determined to uncover the truth behind his apparent magical powers

programme.title: Pocket Dragon Adventures
programme.desc: A group of very small dragons live with a kindly old wizard, they're not big enough to fly but that doesn't stop them having many adventures.

programme.title: Inside Claridge's
programme.desc: Regular guest Alexander, Crown Prince of Yugoslavia, returns to stay in the suite in which he was born in 1945. There are also visits by actress Joan Collins, writer and comedian Stephen Fry and the Emperor of Japan, as well as 85-year-old former bookmaker Gerry Parker, who has breakfasted at Claridge's for the past 40 years. General manager Thomas Kochs takes any change very seriously and oversees every decision necessary - from new alarm clocks to a £10million renovation plan

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: Best of The Tube
programme.desc: Recapping the finest moments from the music show that was hosted by Jools Holland and the late Paula Yates

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: The Rolling Stones guitarist and former Faces bandmate Ian McLagan reminisce about their time on the road together in the 1970s, and discuss the band's 2011 reunion tour

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: Patients with a wide range of ailments are invited to attend the Food Hospital, where consultant surgeon Shaw Somers, dietitian Lucy Jones and GP Giovanni Miletto are among specialists aiming to discover if tailored nutritional programmes can help. Among those in need of assistance are a 24-year-old woman suffering from polycystic ovary syndrome, and a 44-year-old single father battling type 2 diabetes. Pixie McKenna also investigates the truth about superfoods and the programme features an experiment to see if chocolate can help combat high blood pressure

programme.title: Piccadilly Incident (1946)
programme.desc: A Wren is pronounced missing in action, but returns three years later to find her husband has remarried. Melodrama, starring Anna Neagle and Michael Wilding

programme.title: Account Rendered (1957)
programme.desc: Police find no end of suspects with strong motives when they investigate the murder of a wealthy woman. Mystery, starring Griffith Jones and Honor Blackman

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Swan Corner
programme.desc: A day in the life on the High Street in West Wickham, shot in 1968 on 8mm film. Showing activities at different times of the day, including The Swan Pub

programme.title: Sapphire and Steel
programme.desc: While Sapphire is unconscious, her spirit appears on the railway platform with the other ghosts. The soldier is not through with trying to get rid of Steel

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: Producer Mark Ronson compares notes with Ronnie about their varied approaches to the recording process, and the pair also discuss artists including Amy Winehouse and Stevie Wonder

programme.title: Inside Claridge's
programme.desc: Regular guest Alexander, Crown Prince of Yugoslavia, returns to stay in the suite in which he was born in 1945. There are also visits by actress Joan Collins, writer and comedian Stephen Fry and the Emperor of Japan, as well as 85-year-old former bookmaker Gerry Parker, who has breakfasted at Claridge's for the past 40 years. General manager Thomas Kochs takes any change very seriously and oversees every decision necessary - from new alarm clocks to a £10million renovation plan

programme.title: Sapphire and Steel
programme.desc: Part seven of eight. The agents find they have travelled 12 days into the future, in which time the ghosts have vanished and Tully has made a dangerous bargain

programme.title: Danger Man
programme.desc: John Drake (Patrick McGoohan), a secret agent working for NATO, travels to different corners of the world in order to prevent crimes that threaten world peace

programme.title: After You've Gone
programme.desc: Comedy following the life of divorcee Jimmy Venables after his former wife leaves to perform charity work in Africa, prompting his mother-in-law to move in to the family home. Nicholas Lyndhurst and Celia Imrie star

programme.title: The Watchmaker
programme.desc: Documentary about Clifford Bowler's watchmaking shop in West Hampstead. Clifford was a Mill Lane tradesman for over 67 years

programme.title: A Perfect 14 ()
programme.desc: The fascinating world of plus-size modelling and the women involved who are fighting to reshape fashion and the standards of society

programme.title: The Occupation
programme.desc: The incredible true story of Sara Góralnik who at age 13 survived the Holocaust by taking refuge in a small Ukrainian village and passing as a Christian after her entire family was killed by Nazis

programme.title: Perfect Skin (2018)
programme.desc: Katia Matuschak, an 18-year-old Polish woman, embarks on a relationship with mysterious tattoo artist Bob Reid. However, their relationship takes a dark turn as her fascination with him grows, and in an attempt to fulfil his dream, he kidnaps her. Psychological horror, starring Richard Brake, Natalia Kostrzewa and Jo Woodcock

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: Bernard O'Mahoney explores the media's influence on building male celebrities

programme.title: The Comic Strip Presents
programme.desc: An American woman and a comedian's girlfriend both do their utmost to get into Oxford university to study the works of Lord Byron - but what will they do to gain a place at the great seat of learning? Comedy, starring Jennifer Saunders, Dawn French, Lenny Henry and Nigel Planer

programme.title: Skid Kids (1953)
programme.desc: A group of kids takes on a gang of bike thieves, with a little help from the police. Children's drama, starring Barry MacGregor and Anthony Lang

programme.title: Dork Hunters from Outer Space
programme.desc: A group of heroes try to stop aliens taking over the universe

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: A spell puts Kylie and X to sleep, leaving Kate and Kim in need of a new bodyguard

programme.desc: Snorre, Tjure and Vic are kidnapped by Sven, but cause confusion for their captors with a little ventriloquism

programme.title: Vic the Viking

programme.title: Pocket Dragon Adventures
programme.desc: A group of very small dragons live with a kindly old wizard, they're not big enough to fly but that doesn't stop them having many adventures.

programme.title: Inside Claridge's
programme.desc: Thirty delegations from around the world arrive to stay at the hotel for the duration of the Olympics, with the red carpet being rolled out five times a day for heads of state. World-famous Danish eatery Noma sets up a pop-up restaurant in the ballroom and Claridge's chefs are faced with providing Nordic-foraged food to thousands of guests who have paid £195 each. A couple fly in from Atlanta for the wedding of their dreams and a butler prepares a suite for one of the hotel's most valued guests, bringing furniture, hat boxes and 20 suits out of storage for just one night

programme.title: Bloomfield (1970)
programme.desc: An Israeli footballer nearing the end of his career is tempted to accept a bribe to throw his final game. A devoted young fan and a woman who is in love with him prick his conscience, but even if he chooses to do the right thing, his failing skills may not be enough to triumph over younger, fitter opposition. Sporting drama based on Joseph Gross' novel, co-directed by and starring Richard Harris, with Romy Schneider and Kim Burfield

programme.title: Manganinnie (1980)
programme.desc: An Australian Aboriginal woman goes in search of her lost tribe, accompanied on her journey by a lost white girl. with whom she forms a close bond despite having no common language. As their journey towards the coast continues, the woman begins to suspect her people and culture may have been all but wiped out by British colonists. Historical drama, starring Mawuyul Yanthalawuy and Anna Ralph

programme.desc: Hull Kingston Rovers v St Helens (Kick-off 8.15pm). Coverage of the match from the second round of fixtures, which takes place at Totally Wicked Stadium. The last meeting between the two sides took place in September 2020, when St Helens score a last-minute drop-goal to win a tight encounter 21-20. Theo Fages made the golden-point kick to extended the Saints unbeaten run to six games on their way to winning the 2020 Grand Final.
